| `F-bn-062` | `bn` | `tools.colorPicker.defaultSwatchLabel` | caller composition / accessible label-value relation | `"{mode} {default}"` | `"{mode}: {default}"` | The now-live formatter produced ambiguous bare adjacency such as `аҰІа§ҮаҰ–аҰҫаҰ° аҰ°аҰҷ аҰЎаҰҝаҰ«аҰІа§ҚаҰҹ`. The colon creates a clear mode/value label and follows the localeвҖҷs existing count-neutral UI label pattern. | verified |
| `F-bn-063` | `bn` | `tools.colorPicker.colorSwatchLabel` | caller composition / accessible label-value relation | `"{mode} {color}"` | `"{mode}: {color}"` | All 18 named-color commands need the same explicit relationship; the replacement produces standalone labels such as `аҰІа§ҮаҰ–аҰҫаҰ° аҰ°аҰҷ: аҰІаҰҫаҰІ` while preserving both runtime placeholders. | verified |
| `F-bn-064` | `bn` | `searchTerms.number` | search alias / numbered-list semantics | `"аҰёаҰӮаҰ–а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫ"` | `"аҰёаҰӮаҰ–а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰҜаҰјаҰЁ"` | This alias belongs only to the numbered-list search group. `аҰёаҰӮаҰ–а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫ` is a generic number noun, while official [LibreOffice Bengali list guidance](https://help.libreoffice.org/latest/bn/text/swriter/guide/using_numbering.html) uses `аҰёаҰӮаҰ–а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰҜаҰјаҰЁ` for the editor operation. | verified |
| `F-bn-065` | `bn` | `tools.image.alignmentCenterAria` | action terminology / sibling consistency | `"аҰ®аҰҫаҰқа§Ү аҰёаҰҫаҰ°аҰҝаҰ¬аҰҰа§ҚаҰ§ аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ"` | `"аҰ®аҰҫаҰқаҰ–аҰҫаҰЁа§Ү аҰёаҰҫаҰ°аҰҝаҰ¬аҰҰа§ҚаҰ§ аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ"` | The image and embed control performs the same center-alignment action as the already-reviewed video and audio callers; the replacement makes all three live actions consistent. | verified |
| `F-bn-066` | `bn` | `tools.image.downloadOriginal` | action grammar / object clarity | `"аҰ®а§ӮаҰІ аҰЎаҰҫаҰүаҰЁаҰІа§ӢаҰЎ"` | `"аҰҶаҰёаҰІ аҰӣаҰ¬аҰҝ аҰЎаҰҫаҰүаҰЁаҰІа§ӢаҰЎ аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ"` | The old noun fragment could mean a primary download and omitted what is downloaded. The replacement is a complete imperative naming the uncropped original image. | verified |
| `F-bn-067` | `bn` | `tools.image.navigationControls` | accessibility / navigation relationship | `"аҰӣаҰ¬аҰҝ аҰЁа§ҮаҰӯаҰҝаҰ—а§ҮаҰ¶аҰЁ"` | `"аҰӣаҰ¬аҰҝаҰ—а§ҒаҰІа§ӢаҰ° аҰ®аҰ§а§ҚаҰҜа§Ү аҰЁа§ҮаҰӯаҰҝаҰ—а§ҮаҰ¶аҰЁ"` | The ARIA group contains previous-image and next-image controls. `аҰӣаҰ¬аҰҝаҰ—а§ҒаҰІа§ӢаҰ° аҰ®аҰ§а§ҚаҰҜа§Ү` states navigation among multiple images and matches the localeвҖҷs reviewed block-navigation construction. | verified |
| `F-bn-068` | `bn` | `tools.audio.emptyOrDropHere` | drop-target object clarity | `"аҰ…аҰҘаҰ¬аҰҫ аҰҸаҰ–аҰҫаҰЁа§Ү аҰ…аҰЎаҰҝаҰ“ аҰ«а§ҮаҰІа§ҒаҰЁ"` | `"аҰ…аҰҘаҰ¬аҰҫ аҰҸаҰ–аҰҫаҰЁа§Ү аҰ…аҰЎаҰҝаҰ“ аҰ«аҰҫаҰҮаҰІ аҰ«а§ҮаҰІа§ҒаҰЁ"` | The drop target accepts a file, not abstract audio. Official [Files by Google Bengali help](https://support.google.com/files/answer/10018943?hl=bn) uses the exact product term `аҰ…аҰЎаҰҝаҰ“ аҰ«аҰҫаҰҮаҰІ`. | verified |
| `F-bn-069` | `bn` | `blockSettings.blocksSelected` | number grammar / classifier | `"{count} аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ•"` | `"{count}аҰҹаҰҝ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ•"` | This dynamic selected-block count requires the Bengali classifier `аҰҹаҰҝ`; the replacement matches every sibling block-count announcement and standard Bengali numeralвҖ“noun construction. Evidence: [Unicode CLDR Bengali number verification](https://www.unicode.org/cldr/cldr-aux/charts/28/verify/numbers/bn.html); [Google Android accessibility guidance](https://support.google.com/accessibility/android/answer/6151854?hl=bn). | verified |
| `F-bn-070` | `bn` | `a11y.blocksDuplicated` | caller semantics / accessibility | `"{count}аҰҹаҰҝ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ• {position} аҰ…аҰ¬аҰёа§ҚаҰҘаҰҫаҰЁ аҰҘа§ҮаҰ•а§Ү аҰ•аҰӘаҰҝ аҰ•аҰ°аҰҫ аҰ№аҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰӣа§Ү"` | `"{count}аҰҹаҰҝ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ• аҰ•аҰӘаҰҝ аҰ•аҰ°аҰҫ аҰ№аҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰӣа§ҮаҘӨ аҰ¶а§ҒаҰ°а§ҒаҰ° аҰ…аҰ¬аҰёа§ҚаҰҘаҰҫаҰЁ: {position}"` | The drag-a11y caller passes the first newly duplicated block's destination index as `{position}`, not the source position. The replacement announces the completed duplication and labels the new duplicates' starting position without reversing that relationship. | verified |
| `F-bn-071` | `bn` | `tools.image.errorSourceOffline` | natural error copy / resource state | `"аҰүа§ҺаҰё аҰ«аҰҫаҰҮаҰІаҰҹаҰҝ аҰёаҰ°аҰҫаҰЁа§Ӣ аҰ№аҰҜаҰја§Ү аҰҘаҰҫаҰ•аҰӨа§Ү аҰӘаҰҫаҰ°а§Ү аҰ¬аҰҫ аҰ…аҰ«аҰІаҰҫаҰҮаҰЁ аҰ№аҰӨа§Ү аҰӘаҰҫаҰ°а§ҮаҘӨ"` | `"аҰүа§ҺаҰё аҰ«аҰҫаҰҮаҰІаҰҹаҰҝ аҰёаҰ°аҰҫаҰЁа§Ӣ аҰ№аҰҜаҰја§Ү аҰҘаҰҫаҰ•аҰӨа§Ү аҰӘаҰҫаҰ°а§Ү аҰ¬аҰҫ аҰ…аҰЁа§ҒаҰӘаҰІаҰ¬а§ҚаҰ§ аҰ№аҰӨа§Ү аҰӘаҰҫаҰ°а§ҮаҘӨ"` | A file is not naturally described as being offline. The broken-image caller needs the broader moved-or-unavailable source state, and `аҰ…аҰЁа§ҒаҰӘаҰІаҰ¬а§ҚаҰ§` matches the locale's existing image-unavailable terminology. | verified |
| `F-bn-072` | `bn` | `a11y.allBlocksSelected` | accessibility / count neutrality | `"аҰёаҰ¬ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ• аҰЁаҰҝаҰ°а§ҚаҰ¬аҰҫаҰҡаҰҝаҰӨ аҰ№аҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰӣа§Ү, {count}аҰҹаҰҝ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ•"` | `"аҰёаҰ¬ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ• аҰЁаҰҝаҰ°а§ҚаҰ¬аҰҫаҰҡаҰҝаҰӨ аҰ№аҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰӣа§ҮаҘӨ аҰ®а§ӢаҰҹ: {count}"` | The select-all live-region caller can receive one or many blocks. Separating the completion from a noun-free total avoids count-sensitive repetition and matches the corrected source contract. | verified |
| `F-bn-073` | `bn` | `blockSettings.clickAction` | caller composition / connective grammar | `"аҰ•а§ҚаҰІаҰҝаҰ• аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ"` | `"аҰҸаҰ•аҰҹаҰҝ аҰ•а§ҚаҰІаҰҝаҰ•"` | This fragment begins both composed menu-opening instructions. A finite imperative cannot connect naturally to the following `аҰҰаҰҝаҰҜаҰја§Ү` or `аҰ•аҰ°а§Ү`; the noun phrase produces grammatical single-click instructions. | verified |
| `F-bn-074` | `bn` | `blockSettings.orConjunction` | caller composition / shortcut clarity | `" аҰ…аҰҘаҰ¬аҰҫ аҰҸаҰҮ аҰ¶аҰ°а§ҚаҰҹаҰ•аҰҫаҰҹ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰ¬аҰ№аҰҫаҰ° аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ: "` | `" аҰ•аҰ°а§Ү аҰ…аҰҘаҰ¬аҰҫ аҰ•а§ҖаҰ¬а§ӢаҰ°а§ҚаҰЎ аҰ¶аҰ°а§ҚаҰҹаҰ•аҰҫаҰҹ "` | The caller places this fragment between the click phrase and the literal shortcut. The replacement supplies the Bengali connective and identifies the following token as a keyboard shortcut without embedding an incompatible imperative. | verified |
| `F-bn-075` | `bn` | `blockSettings.openMenuAction` | caller composition / complete instruction | `" аҰ®а§ҮаҰЁа§Ғ аҰ–а§ҒаҰІаҰӨа§Ү"` | `" аҰҰаҰҝаҰҜаҰја§Ү аҰ®а§ҮаҰЁа§Ғ аҰ–а§ҒаҰІа§ҒаҰЁ"` | This fragment closes both composed instructions. The replacement turns the trailing infinitive into a complete imperative and supplies the instrumental connective required after either the click or shortcut phrase. | verified |
| `F-bn-076` | `bn` | `a11y.dragHandle` | action clarity / accessibility | `"аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ• аҰёаҰ°аҰҫаҰӨа§Ү аҰҹаҰҫаҰЁа§ҒаҰЁ аҰ¬аҰҫ аҰ®а§ҮаҰЁа§ҒаҰ° аҰңаҰЁа§ҚаҰҜ аҰ•а§ҚаҰІаҰҝаҰ• аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ"` | `"аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ• аҰёаҰ°аҰҫаҰӨа§Ү аҰҹаҰҫаҰЁа§ҒаҰЁ аҰ¬аҰҫ аҰ®а§ҮаҰЁа§Ғ аҰ–а§ҒаҰІаҰӨа§Ү аҰ•а§ҚаҰІаҰҝаҰ• аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ"` | The drag-handle button opens the block menu when clicked. Naming that action directly is clearer than the vague вҖңclick for the menuвҖқ construction. | verified |
| `F-bn-077` | `bn` | `tools.video.seekValueText` | numeric suffix attachment / accessibility | `"{total} аҰҸаҰ° аҰ®аҰ§а§ҚаҰҜа§Ү {current}"` | `"{total}-аҰҸаҰ° аҰ®аҰ§а§ҚаҰҜа§Ү {current}"` | The video seek caller interpolates Latin-digit `M:SS` values into this slider `aria-valuetext`. Bengali attaches the genitive suffix to numeric or non-Bengali tokens with a hyphen; GoogleвҖҷs Bengali progress UI uses the exact pattern [`5-аҰҸаҰ° аҰ®аҰ§а§ҚаҰҜа§Ү 1`](https://support.google.com/files/answer/9765316?hl=bn). | verified |
| `F-bn-078` | `bn` | `a11y.dropPosition` | numeric ordinal semantics / accessibility | `"{total}аҰҹаҰҝаҰ° аҰ®аҰ§а§ҚаҰҜа§Ү {position} аҰ…аҰ¬аҰёа§ҚаҰҘаҰҫаҰЁа§Ү аҰ°аҰҫаҰ–аҰҫ аҰ№аҰ¬а§Ү"` | `"{total}аҰҹаҰҝаҰ° аҰ®аҰ§а§ҚаҰҜа§Ү {position} аҰЁаҰ®а§ҚаҰ¬аҰ° аҰ…аҰ¬аҰёа§ҚаҰҘаҰҫаҰЁа§Ү аҰ°аҰҫаҰ–аҰҫ аҰ№аҰ¬а§Ү"` | The polite drag announcement receives one-based numeric `position` and numeric `total`; the bare cardinal can read as a count of positions rather than вҖңposition 3.вҖқ BangladeshвҖҷs Press Information Department uses [`аҰҸаҰ• аҰЁаҰ®а§ҚаҰ¬аҰ° аҰ…аҰ¬аҰёа§ҚаҰҘаҰҫаҰЁа§Ү`](https://pressinform.gov.bd/site/allnotes/cbadeb77-c1c0-4e3e-b102-1b1ea0cb35ae), explicitly marking the numeric position with `аҰЁаҰ®а§ҚаҰ¬аҰ°`. | verified |

| `F-bs-179` | `bs` | `toolNames.inlineCode` | tool distinction / established product terminology | `"Kod"` | `"Umetnuti kod"` | The inline formatter and separate code-block tool exposed the same title. | `F-bs-180` | `bs` | `tools.image.navigationControls` | accessibility / navigation relationship | `"Navigacija slikama"` | `"Navigacija izmeД‘u slika"` | This ARIA group contains previous-image and next-image controls. `izmeД‘u slika` states movement among images directly instead of leaving the relationship underspecified. | verified |
| `F-bs-181` | `bs` | `tools.video.seek` | accessibility / media-control semantics | `"Premotavanje"` | `"Pozicija reprodukcije"` | The value labels a range whose value is the current playback position, not a rewind operation. | `F-bs-182` | `bs` | `tools.image.errorSourceOffline` | natural error copy / resource availability | `"Izvorna datoteka je moЕҫda premjeЕЎtena ili nije na mreЕҫi."` | `"Izvorna datoteka je moЕҫda premjeЕЎtena ili viЕЎe nije dostupna."` | The broken-image caller knows only that a remote image resource repeatedly failed to load, not that the file is literally вҖңoff the network.вҖқ The replacement states the user-relevant moved-or-unavailable condition; official regional product copy likewise uses [`viЕЎe nije dostupna`](https://support.microsoft.com/sr-latn-rs/office/opcija-odbaci-vi%C5%A1e-nije-dostupna-za-pominjanja-i-reakcije-u-oknu-obave%C5%A1tenja-programa-outlook-9f8df9f8-3b4c-4280-9181-038a94bfae65) for an unavailable state. | verified |

| `F-da-088` | `da` | `tools.video.seek` | accessibility / range-control state | `"Spol"` | `"Afspilningsposition"` | This is the accessible name of a range slider whose separate value text announces current and total time, not an imperative button. | `F-el-069` | `el` | `tools.video.ctxStats` | source meaning / neutral register | `"ОЈП„ОұП„О№ПғП„О№ОәО¬ ОіО№Оұ ОөО№ОҙО№ОәОҝПҚПӮ"` | `"ОЈП„ОұП„О№ПғП„О№ОәО¬ ОұОҪОұПҖОұПҒОұОіПүОіО®ПӮ"` | The current wording changes the neutral source into an audience label; the replacement directly names playback data. | verified |

| `F-el-071` | `el` | `a11y.blocksDuplicated` | accessibility / caller destination semantics | `"{count} ОјПҖО»ОҝОә ОұОҪП„О№ОіПҒО¬ПҶО·ОәОұОҪ ОұПҖПҢ П„О· ОёОӯПғО· {position}"` | `"О‘ОҪП„О№ОіПҒО¬ПҶО·ОәОұОҪ {count} ОјПҖО»ОҝОә. ОҳОӯПғО· ОӯОҪОұПҒОҫО·ПӮ: {position}."` | The caller supplies the first newly duplicated blockвҖҷs destination index, not a source position. The replacement removes the misleading `ОұПҖПҢ` relation and uses the established Greek position term [ОҳОӯПғО· ОӯОҪОұПҒОҫО·ПӮ](https://support.apple.com/el-gr/105033). | verified |
| `F-el-072` | `el` | `toolNames.inlineCode` | tool distinction / established terminology | `"ОҡПҺОҙО№ОәОұПӮ"` | `"О•ОҪПғПүОјОұП„ПүОјОӯОҪОҝПӮ ОәПҺОҙО№ОәОұПӮ"` | The inline formatter and separate code-block tool currently expose the same title. Microsoft Greek distinguishes inline formatting as [О•ОҪПғПүОјОұП„ПүОјОӯОҪОҝПӮ ОәПҺОҙО№ОәОұПӮ](https://learn.microsoft.com/el-gr/contribute/content/code-in-docs). | verified |
| `F-es-087` | `es` | `toolNames.clearFormat` | missing key / source coverage | `missing` | `"Borrar formato"` | MicrosoftвҖҷs Spanish editor UI uses the exact concise command [Borrar formato](https://support.microsoft.com/es-es/office/borrar-todo-el-formato-de-texto-c094c4da-7f09-4cea-9a8d-c166949c9c80). | verified |
| `F-es-088` | `es` | `blockSettings.clickAction` | caller composition / naturalness | `"Clic"` | `"Haz clic"` | The fragment is composed with an optional shortcut and `para abrir el menГә`; the imperative produces the natural instruction `Haz clic o вҢҳ/ para abrir el menГә` instead of a bare noun. | verified |
| `F-es-089` | `es` | `tools.colorPicker.defaultSwatchLabel` | accessibility / spoken-label clarity | `"{mode} {default}"` | `"{mode}: {default}"` | The template is a swatch accessible name; the colon separates the mode from its value in output such as `Color del texto: Predeterminado`. | verified |
| `F-es-090` | `es` | `tools.colorPicker.colorSwatchLabel` | accessibility / spoken-label clarity | `"{mode} {color}"` | `"{mode}: {color}"` | The template is a swatch accessible name; the colon makes output such as `Color del texto: Rojo` an unambiguous label-value pair. | verified |
| `F-es-091` | `es` | `tools.table.clearSelection` | context / action accuracy | `"Borrar"` | `"Borrar contenido"` | Both table callers clear selected cell, row, or column contents while preserving the cells and formatting; Microsoft Excel uses the exact Spanish command `Borrar contenido`. | verified |
| `F-es-092` | `es` | `tools.table.comfortableText` | naturalness / density terminology | `"Texto cГіmodo"` | `"Texto espacioso"` | The current label is an English calque; the option describes the roomier density opposite `Texto compacto`, not emotional comfort. | verified |
| `F-es-093` | `es` | `tools.callout.emojiCategoryActivity` | established emoji-category terminology / number | `"Actividad"` | `"Actividades"` | The emoji picker renders a category heading and navigation label; Microsoft TeamsвҖҷ Spanish emoji gallery uses the plural category name `Actividades`. | verified |
| `F-es-094` | `es` | `tools.image.errorDefaultMessage` | natural error copy / source synchronization | `"La URL devolviГі un error. Prueba con otra fuente o vuelve a subir el archivo."` | `"No se pudo cargar la imagen desde esta URL. Prueba con otra fuente o vuelve a subir el archivo."` | A URL does not itself return an error; the replacement directly identifies the failed image load while retaining the concise informal recovery instruction. | verified |
| `F-es-095` | `es` | `tools.file.previewRaw` | context / source synchronization | `"Sin formato"` | `"Fuente"` | The Markdown tab shows the fileвҖҷs source text; `Sin formato` describes styling rather than the content and no longer matches the corrected source contract. | verified |

| `F-hi-049` | `hi` | `tools.image.errorSourceOffline` | natural error copy / resource state | `"аӨёаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨӨ аӨ«аӨјаӨҫаӨҮаӨІ аӨ•аӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨІаҘҮ аӨңаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ—аӨҲ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ‘аӨ«аӨјаӨІаӨҫаӨҮаӨЁ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ"` | `"аӨ№аҘӢ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨёаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨӨ аӨ«аӨјаӨҫаӨҮаӨІ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨІаҘҮ аӨңаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨөаӨ№ аӨүаӨӘаӨІаӨ¬аҘҚаӨ§ аӨЁ аӨ№аҘӢаҘӨ"` | Hindi naturally fronts the uncertainty as `аӨ№аҘӢ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ•аӨҝ`; the replacement keeps the source-file object explicit and avoids describing a file itself as offline. | verified |
| `F-hi-050` | `hi` | `tools.image.errorDefaultMessage` | source synchronization / error clarity | `"URL аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҚаӨ°аҘҒаӨҹаӨҝ аӨІаҘҢаӨҹаӨҫаӨҲаҘӨ аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨ…аӨЁаҘҚаӨҜ аӨёаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨӨ аӨҶаӨңаӨјаӨ®аӨҫаӨҸаӨӮ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ«аӨјаӨҫаӨҮаӨІ аӨ«аӨҝаӨ° аӨёаҘҮ аӨ…аӨӘаӨІаҘӢаӨЎ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮаҘӨ"` | `"аӨҮаӨё URL аӨёаҘҮ аӨӣаӨөаӨҝ аӨІаҘӢаӨЎ аӨЁаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨңаӨҫ аӨёаӨ•аҘҖаҘӨ аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨҰаҘӮаӨёаӨ°аӨҫ аӨёаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨӨ аӨҶаӨңаӨјаӨ®аӨҫаӨҸаӨӮ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ«аӨјаӨҫаӨҮаӨІ аӨ«аӨҝаӨ° аӨёаҘҮ аӨ…аӨӘаӨІаҘӢаӨЎ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮаҘӨ"` | The corrected source identifies the failed image load; the old text personifies the URL and obscures what failed. | verified |

| `F-ka-004` | `ka` | `tools.toggle.bodyPlaceholder` | changed-English synchronization / collapsible terminology | `"бғӘбғҗбғ бғҳбғ”бғҡбғҳ бғ©бғҗбғӣбғқбғЎбғҗбғЁбғҡбғ”бғҡбғҳ. бғ“бғҗбғҗбғ¬бғҷбғҗбғһбғЈбғңбғ”бғ— бғҗбғң бғ©бғҗбғҗбғ’бғ“бғ”бғ— бғ‘бғҡбғқбғҷбғ”бғ‘бғҳ бғЁбғҳбғ’бғңбғҳбғ—."` | `"бғӘбғҗбғ бғҳбғ”бғҡбғҳ бғ©бғҗбғҷбғ”бғӘбғ•бғҗбғ“бғҳ бғ‘бғҡбғқбғҷбғҳ. бғ“бғҗбғҗбғ¬бғҷбғҗбғһбғЈбғңбғ”бғ— бғ‘бғҡбғқбғҷбғҳбғЎ бғ“бғҗбғЎбғҗбғӣбғҗбғўбғ”бғ‘бғҡбғҗбғ“ бғҗбғң бғ©бғҗбғ•бғҡбғ”бғ‘бғҳбғ— бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғҳбғўбғҗбғңбғ”бғ— бғ‘бғҡбғқбғҷбғ”бғ‘бғҳ бғҗбғҘ."` | The old value omitted what clicking does and called a collapsible content block a dropdown. The caller creates and focuses a child on click; Google distinguishes [`бғ©бғҗбғӣбғқбғЎбғҗбғЁбғҡбғ”бғҡбғҳ бғӣбғ”бғңбғҳбғЈ`](https://support.google.com/youtube/answer/94522?hl=ka) from content that can be [`бғ©бғҗбғҷбғ”бғӘбғҳбғҡбғҳ`](https://support.google.com/youtube/answer/2673341?co=GENIE.Platform%3DAndroid&hl=ka), and uses [`бғ©бғҗбғ•бғҡбғ”бғ‘бғҳбғ— бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғҳбғўбғҗбғңбғ”бғ—`](https://support.google.com/youtube/answer/3077589?hl=ka) for dragging. | verified |
| `F-ka-005` | `ka` | `blockSettings.dragToMove` | action semantics / drag gesture | `"бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғҳбғўбғҗбғңбғ”бғ— бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғЎбғҗбғўбғҗбғңбғҗбғ“"` | `"бғ©бғҗбғ•бғҡбғ”бғ‘бғҳбғ— бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғҳбғўбғҗбғңбғ”бғ—"` | The current tautology says вҖңmove to moveвҖқ and does not identify dragging. GoogleвҖҷs Georgian UI uses the exact action phrase [`бғ©бғҗбғ•бғҡбғ”бғ‘бғҳбғ— бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғҳбғўбғҗбғңбғ”бғ—`](https://support.google.com/youtube/answer/7552722?co=GENIE.Platform%3DAndroid&hl=ka). | verified |
| `F-ka-006` | `ka` | `a11y.dragHandle` | accessibility action semantics | `"бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғҳбғўбғҗбғңбғ”бғ— бғ‘бғҡбғқбғҷбғҳбғЎ бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғЎбғҗбғўбғҗбғңбғҗбғ“ бғҗбғң бғ“бғҗбғҗбғ¬бғҷбғҗбғһбғЈбғңбғ”бғ— бғӣбғ”бғңбғҳбғЈбғЎбғ—бғ•бғҳбғЎ"` | `"бғ©бғҗбғ•бғҡбғ”бғ‘бғҳбғ— бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғҳбғўбғҗбғңбғ”бғ— бғ‘бғҡбғқбғҷбғҳ бғҗбғң бғӣбғ”бғңбғҳбғЈбғЎ бғ’бғҗбғЎбғҗбғ®бғЎбғңбғ”бғҡбғҗбғ“ бғ“бғҗбғҗбғ¬бғҷбғҗбғһбғЈбғңбғ”бғ—"` | This drag-handle label must name both available actions. The replacement removes the move-to-move tautology, names the drag gesture, and states that clicking opens the menu. | verified |
| `F-ka-007` | `ka` | `toolNames.toggleList` | collapsible versus dropdown terminology | `"бғ©бғҗбғӣбғқбғЎбғҗбғЁбғҡбғ”бғҡбғҳ бғЎбғҳбғҗ"` | `"бғ©бғҗбғҷбғ”бғӘбғ•бғҗбғ“бғҳ бғЎбғҳбғҗ"` | This tool contains collapsible list content rather than a dropdown menu. GoogleвҖҷs Georgian product UI distinguishes dropdown `бғ©бғҗбғӣбғқбғЎбғҗбғЁбғҡбғ”бғҡбғҳ` from collapse `бғ©бғҗбғҷбғ”бғӘбғ•бғҗ`. | verified |
| `F-ka-008` | `ka` | `tools.header.toggleHeading` | collapsible versus dropdown terminology | `"бғ©бғҗбғӣбғқбғЎбғҗбғЁбғҡбғ”бғҡбғҳ бғЎбғҗбғ—бғҗбғЈбғ бғҳ"` | `"бғ©бғҗбғҷбғ”бғӘбғ•бғҗбғ“бғҳ бғЎбғҗбғ—бғҗбғЈбғ бғҳ"` | The heading expands and collapses nested content; `бғ©бғҗбғӣбғқбғЎбғҗбғЁбғҡбғ”бғҡбғҳ` instead denotes a dropdown. | verified |
| `F-ka-009` | `ka` | `tools.header.toggleHeading1` | collapsible versus dropdown terminology | `"бғ©бғҗбғӣбғқбғЎбғҗбғЁбғҡбғ”бғҡбғҳ бғЎбғҗбғ—бғҗбғЈбғ бғҳ 1"` | `"бғ©бғҗбғҷбғ”бғӘбғ•бғҗбғ“бғҳ бғЎбғҗбғ—бғҗбғЈбғ бғҳ 1"` | The level-specific heading belongs to the same finite collapsible-heading family and must use the same reviewed term. | verified |

| `F-ka-016` | `ka` | `tools.toggle.ariaLabelCollapse` | established accessibility terminology | `"бғ©бғҗбғ®бғ•бғ”бғ•бғҗ"` | `"бғ©бғҗбғҷбғ”бғӘбғ•бғҗ"` | AndroidвҖҷs Georgian accessibility resources pair expand `бғ’бғҗбғЁбғҡбғҗ` with the exact collapse action [`бғ©бғҗбғҷбғ”бғӘбғ•бғҗ`](https://android.googlesource.com/platform/prebuilts/sdk/+/f9ce7c329fe53406673d88f8e0746c203c74f0ca/current/support/v7/mediarouter/res/values-ka/strings.xml). | verified |
| `F-ka-017` | `ka` | `searchTerms.toggle` | localized search semantics | `"бғ©бғҗбғӣбғқбғЎбғҗбғЁбғҡбғ”бғҡбғҳ"` | `"бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғӣбғ бғ—бғ•бғ”бғҡбғҳ"` | The old alias searches for a dropdown. `бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғӣбғ бғ—бғ•бғ”бғҡбғҳ` preserves the distinct Georgian query for вҖңtoggle,вҖқ while `searchTerms.collapsible` already covers `бғ©бғҗбғҷбғ”бғӘбғ•бғҗбғ“бғҳ`. | verified |
| `F-ka-018` | `ka` | `searchTerms.collapse` | established search terminology | `"бғ©бғҗбғ®бғ•бғ”бғ•бғҗ"` | `"бғ©бғҗбғҷбғ”бғӘбғ•бғҗ"` | The alias now matches the reviewed Android and Google Georgian collapse term used by the live control. | verified |
| `F-ka-019` | `ka` | `tools.colorPicker.defaultSwatchLabel` | caller composition / Georgian word order | `"{mode} {default}"` | `"{default} {mode}"` | The runtime substitutes full noun phrases such as `бғўбғ”бғҘбғЎбғўбғҳбғЎ бғӨбғ”бғ бғҳ`; modifier-first order produces natural labels such as `бғңбғҗбғ’бғЈбғҡбғҳбғЎбғ®бғӣбғ”бғ•бғҳ бғўбғ”бғҘбғЎбғўбғҳбғЎ бғӨбғ”бғ бғҳ` rather than the reversed current phrase. | verified |
| `F-ka-020` | `ka` | `tools.colorPicker.colorSwatchLabel` | caller composition / Georgian word order | `"{mode} {color}"` | `"{color} {mode}"` | The runtime substitutes a color adjective and mode noun phrase. Modifier-first order produces `бғ¬бғҳбғ—бғ”бғҡбғҳ бғўбғ”бғҘбғЎбғўбғҳбғЎ бғӨбғ”бғ бғҳ` and `бғ¬бғҳбғ—бғ”бғҡбғҳ бғӨбғқбғңбғҳ`. | verified |
| `F-ka-021` | `ka` | `a11y.dropPosition` | accessibility placeholder order | `"бғ©бғҗбғҳбғ“бғ”бғ‘бғҗ бғһбғқбғ–бғҳбғӘбғҳбғҗбғ–бғ” {position} {total}-бғ“бғҗбғң"` | `"бғ©бғҗбғҳбғ“бғ”бғ‘бғҗ бғһбғқбғ–бғҳбғӘбғҳбғҗбғ–бғ”: {total}-бғ“бғҗбғң {position}"` | The current English-order interpolation yields an unnatural sequence such as `3 10-бғ“бғҗбғң`. GoogleвҖҷs Georgian sequence UI uses total-first forms such as [`12-бғ“бғҗбғң 1`](https://support.google.com/accounts/answer/7103338?hl=ka). | verified |
| `F-ka-022` | `ka` | `a11y.blockMoved` | accessibility placeholder order | `"бғ‘бғҡбғқбғҷбғҳ бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғўбғҗбғңбғҳбғҡбғҳбғҗ бғһбғқбғ–бғҳбғӘбғҳбғҗбғ–бғ” {position} {total}-бғ“бғҗбғң"` | `"бғ‘бғҡбғқбғҷбғҳ бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғўбғҗбғңбғҳбғҡбғҳбғҗ бғһбғқбғ–бғҳбғӘбғҳбғҗбғ–бғ”: {total}-бғ“бғҗбғң {position}"` | The screen-reader announcement now uses the established total-first Georgian sequence order. | verified |
| `F-ka-023` | `ka` | `a11y.blockDuplicated` | accessibility placeholder order | `"бғ‘бғҡбғқбғҷбғҳ бғ“бғЈбғ‘бғҡбғҳбғ бғ”бғ‘бғЈбғҡбғҳбғҗ бғһбғқбғ–бғҳбғӘбғҳбғҗбғ–бғ” {position} {total}-бғ“бғҗбғң"` | `"бғ‘бғҡбғқбғҷбғҳ бғ“бғЈбғ‘бғҡбғҳбғ бғ”бғ‘бғЈбғҡбғҳбғҗ бғһбғқбғ–бғҳбғӘбғҳбғҗбғ–бғ”: {total}-бғ“бғҗбғң {position}"` | The screen-reader announcement now uses the established total-first Georgian sequence order. | verified |
| `F-ka-024` | `ka` | `a11y.movedUp` | accessibility placeholder order | `"бғ–бғ”бғӣбғқбғ— бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғўбғҗбғңбғҗ бғ“бғҗбғЎбғ бғЈбғҡбғ“бғҗ. бғһбғқбғ–бғҳбғӘбғҳбғҗ: {position} {total}-бғ“бғҗбғң."` | `"бғ–бғ”бғӣбғқбғ— бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғўбғҗбғңбғҗ бғ“бғҗбғЎбғ бғЈбғҡбғ“бғҗ. бғһбғқбғ–бғҳбғӘбғҳбғҗ: {total}-бғ“бғҗбғң {position}."` | The live-region result retains its completed-state wording while correcting the position/total sequence. | verified |
| `F-ka-025` | `ka` | `a11y.movedDown` | accessibility placeholder order | `"бғҘбғ•бғ”бғӣбғқбғ— бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғўбғҗбғңбғҗ бғ“бғҗбғЎбғ бғЈбғҡбғ“бғҗ. бғһбғқбғ–бғҳбғӘбғҳбғҗ: {position} {total}-бғ“бғҗбғң."` | `"бғҘбғ•бғ”бғӣбғқбғ— бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғўбғҗбғңбғҗ бғ“бғҗбғЎбғ бғЈбғҡбғ“бғҗ. бғһбғқбғ–бғҳбғӘбғҳбғҗ: {total}-бғ“бғҗбғң {position}."` | The live-region result retains its completed-state wording while correcting the position/total sequence. | verified |
| `F-ka-026` | `ka` | `a11y.navigationPosition` | accessibility placeholder order | `"{tool}, {position} {total}-бғ“бғҗбғң"` | `"{tool}, {total}-бғ“бғҗбғң {position}"` | Navigation position uses the same total-first sequence convention as the other accessibility announcements. | verified |
| `F-ka-027` | `ka` | `a11y.allBlocksSelected` | changed-English synchronization / count clarity | `"бғҗбғ бғ©бғ”бғЈбғҡбғҳбғҗ бғ§бғ•бғ”бғҡбғҗ бғ‘бғҡбғқбғҷбғҳ, {count} бғ‘бғҡбғқбғҷбғҳ"` | `"бғҗбғ бғ©бғ”бғЈбғҡбғҳбғҗ бғ§бғ•бғ”бғҡбғҗ бғ‘бғҡбғқбғҷбғҳ. бғЎбғЈбғҡ: {count}."` | Georgian retained the superseded repetitive structure. The replacement mirrors the current two-sentence source and labels the total without repeating вҖңblock.вҖқ | verified |
| `F-ka-028` | `ka` | `a11y.navigationModeExited` | accessibility completed-state grammar | `"бғңбғҗбғ•бғҳбғ’бғҗбғӘбғҳбғҳбғЎ бғ бғ”бғҹбғҳбғӣбғҳбғ“бғҗбғң бғ’бғҗбғӣбғқбғЎбғ•бғҡбғҗ"` | `"бғңбғҗбғ•бғҳбғ’бғҗбғӘбғҳбғҳбғЎ бғ бғ”бғҹбғҳбғӣбғҳбғ“бғҗбғң бғ’бғҗбғӣбғқбғ®бғ•бғ”бғ“бғҳбғ—"` | The caller is a live-region result, but the old value is an action noun. The replacement announces the completed state directly to the user. | verified |
| `F-ka-029` | `ka` | `a11y.navigatedToBlock` | accessibility completed-state grammar | `"бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғ•бғҳбғ“бғҗ бғ‘бғҡбғқбғҷбғ–бғ”"` | `"бғ‘бғҡбғқбғҷбғ–бғ” бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғ®бғ•бғ”бғ“бғҳбғ—"` | The old third-person fragment does not address the screen-reader user. The replacement reports the completed navigation in the localeвҖҷs polite second person. | verified |
| `F-ka-030` | `ka` | `searchTerms.unordered` | localized search semantics | `"бғ“бғҗбғЈбғҡбғҗбғ’бғ”бғ‘бғ”бғҡбғҳ"` | `"бғ“бғҗбғЈбғңбғқбғӣбғ бғҗбғ•бғҳ"` | `бғ“бғҗбғЈбғҡбғҗбғ’бғ”бғ‘бғ”бғҡбғҳ` means disorganized or unsorted; the registered alias describes an unnumbered list. | verified |
| `F-ka-031` | `ka` | `searchTerms.pre` | localized search semantics | `"бғ¬бғҳбғңбғҗбғЎбғ¬бғҗбғ "` | `"бғ¬бғҳбғңбғҗбғЎбғ¬бғҗбғ  бғ“бғҗбғӨбғқбғ бғӣбғҗбғўбғ”бғ‘бғЈбғҡбғҳ"` | The bare adverb means вҖңbeforehandвҖқ and does not identify preformatted content. Georgian HTML teaching material uses `бғ¬бғҳбғңбғҗбғЎбғ¬бғҗбғ  бғ“бғҗбғӨбғқбғ бғӣбғҗбғўбғ”бғ‘бғЈбғҡбғҳ бғўбғ”бғҘбғЎбғўбғҳ`. | verified |
| `F-ka-032` | `ka` | `searchTerms.plain` | localized search semantics | `"бғӣбғҗбғ бғўбғҳбғ•бғҳ"` | `"бғЈбғ‘бғ бғҗбғҡбғқ"` | LibreOfficeвҖҷs Georgian UI uses [`бғЈбғ‘бғ бғҗбғҡбғқ бғўбғ”бғҘбғЎбғўбғҳ`](https://help.libreoffice.org/latest/ka/text/swriter/menu/contentcontrol_submenu.html?DbPAR=WRITER) for вҖңPlain TextвҖқ; `бғӣбғҗбғ бғўбғҳбғ•бғҳ` instead means simple. | verified |
| `F-ka-033` | `ka` | `searchTerms.delimiter` | established search terminology | `"бғЁбғ”бғӣбғ–бғҰбғЈбғ“бғ•бғ”бғҡбғҳ"` | `"бғ’бғҗбғӣбғӣбғҳбғҜбғңбғҗбғ•бғҳ"` | The old alias means limiter, while duplicating `бғ’бғҗбғӣбғ§бғқбғӨбғҳ` would collapse this toolвҖҷs Divider and Delimiter queries. The Georgian [technical dictionary](https://techdict.ge/en/word/delimiter/) defines delimiter as `бғ’бғҗбғӣбғӣбғҳбғҜбғңбғҗбғ•бғҳ бғЎбғҳбғӣбғ‘бғқбғҡбғқ / бғңбғҳбғЁбғҗбғңбғҳ`; the concise alias preserves that distinct root. | verified |
| `F-ka-034` | `ka` | `searchTerms.blockquote` | established search terminology | `"бғ‘бғҡбғқбғҷ бғӘбғҳбғўбғҗбғўбғҗ"` | `"бғ‘бғҡбғқбғҷбғЈбғ бғҳ бғӘбғҳбғўбғҗбғўбғҗ"` | Georgian editorial guidance uses the grammatical compound `бғ‘бғҡбғқбғҷбғЈбғ бғҳ бғӘбғҳбғўбғҗбғўбғҗ`; the old juxtaposition is not a natural noun phrase. | verified |
| `F-ka-035` | `ka` | `tools.callout.addEmoji` | changed-English synchronization / icon semantics | `"бғ”бғӣбғқбғҜбғҳбғЎ бғ“бғҗбғӣбғҗбғўбғ”бғ‘бғҗ"` | `"бғ®бғҗбғўбғЈбғҡбғҳбғЎ бғ“бғҗбғӣбғҗбғўбғ”бғ‘бғҗ"` | English changed from вҖңAdd emojiвҖқ to вҖңAdd icon.вҖқ The control opens the icon picker, and the adjacent edit/remove actions also name the resulting icon. | verified |
| `F-ka-036` | `ka` | `tools.callout.editIcon` | Georgian case agreement | `"бғ®бғҗбғўбғЈбғҡбғҗбғЎ бғ бғ”бғ“бғҗбғҘбғўбғҳбғ бғ”бғ‘бғҗ"` | `"бғ®бғҗбғўбғЈбғҡбғҳбғЎ бғ бғ”бғ“бғҗбғҘбғўбғҳбғ бғ”бғ‘бғҗ"` | The action-noun construction requires the icon noun in the genitive, as in this dictionaryвҖҷs `бғ‘бғӣбғЈбғҡбғҳбғЎ бғ бғ”бғ“бғҗбғҘбғўбғҳбғ бғ”бғ‘бғҗ` pattern. | verified |
| `F-ka-037` | `ka` | `tools.callout.removeEmoji` | Georgian case agreement | `"бғ®бғҗбғўбғЈбғҡбғҗбғЎ бғ¬бғҗбғЁбғҡбғҗ"` | `"бғ®бғҗбғўбғЈбғҡбғҳбғЎ бғ¬бғҗбғЁбғҡбғҗ"` | The action-noun construction requires the icon noun in the genitive, matching the dictionaryвҖҷs other remove labels. | verified |

| `F-ka-045` | `ka` | `tools.embed.empty` | caller state / changed-English synchronization | `"бғ©бғҗбғЎбғ•бғҳбғ— бғ‘бғӣбғЈбғҡбғҳ бғ©бғҗбғЎбғҗбғЁбғ”бғңбғ”бғ‘бғҡбғҗбғ“"` | `"бғ©бғҗбғЎбғҗбғЁбғ”бғңбғ”бғ‘бғ”бғҡбғҳ бғ‘бғӣбғЈбғҡбғҳ бғҗбғ  бғҗбғ бғҳбғЎ"` | This string appears only in a read-only empty embed where pasting is impossible. The replacement restores the current state message вҖңNo embed link.вҖқ | verified |
| `F-ka-046` | `ka` | `tools.bookmark.loading` | changed-English synchronization / preview terminology | `"бғӣбғҳбғӣбғқбғ®бғҳбғҡбғ•бғҳбғЎ бғ©бғҗбғўбғ•бғҳбғ бғ—бғ•бғҗ"` | `"бғ‘бғӣбғЈбғҡбғҳбғЎ бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғ®бғ”бғ“бғ•бғҗ бғҳбғўбғ•бғҳбғ бғ—бғ”бғ‘бғҗвҖҰ"` | The caller loads a link preview; `бғӣбғҳбғӣбғқбғ®бғҳбғҡбғ•бғҗ` means review or overview and the old value also drops the loading ellipsis. | verified |
| `F-ka-047` | `ka` | `tools.bookmark.error` | changed-English synchronization / preview terminology | `"бғӣбғҳбғӣбғқбғ®бғҳбғҡбғ•бғҳбғЎ бғ©бғҗбғўбғ•бғҳбғ бғ—бғ•бғҗ бғ•бғ”бғ  бғӣбғқбғ®бғ”бғ бғ®бғ“бғҗ"` | `"бғ‘бғӣбғЈбғҡбғҳбғЎ бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғ®бғ”бғ“бғ•бғҗ бғ•бғ”бғ  бғ©бғҗбғҳбғўбғ•бғҳбғ бғ—бғҗ"` | The caller reports failure to load a link preview; the replacement restores both the link object and the preview sense. | verified |

| `F-ka-050` | `ka` | `tools.image.altDescription` | accessibility copy / changed-English synchronization | `"бғ“бғҗбғҗбғӣбғҗбғўбғ”бғ— бғҗбғҡбғўбғ”бғ бғңбғҗбғўбғҳбғЈбғҡбғҳ бғўбғ”бғҘбғЎбғўбғҳ бғЎбғЈбғ бғҗбғ—бғҳбғЎ бғҗбғҰбғЎбғҗбғ¬бғ”бғ бғҗбғ“. бғ”бғЎ бғ—бғҘбғ•бғ”бғңбғЎ бғ’бғ•бғ”бғ бғ“бғЎ бғӣбғҳбғЎбғҗбғ¬бғ•бғ“бғқбғӣбғЎ бғ®бғ“бғҳбғЎ бғӣбғ®бғ”бғ“бғ•бғ”бғҡбғқбғ‘бғҳбғЎ бғһбғ бғқбғ‘бғҡбғ”бғӣбғ”бғ‘бғҳбғЎ бғӣбғҘбғқбғңбғ” бғӣбғқбғӣбғ®бғӣбғҗбғ бғ”бғ‘бғҡбғ”бғ‘бғҳбғЎбғ—бғ•бғҳбғЎ."` | `"бғҗбғҰбғ¬бғ”бғ бғ”бғ— бғ”бғЎ бғЎбғЈбғ бғҗбғ—бғҳ бғӣбғҗбғ—бғ—бғ•бғҳбғЎ, бғ•бғҳбғңбғӘ бғӣбғҗбғЎ бғ•бғ”бғ  бғ®бғ”бғ“бғҗбғ•бғЎ."` | Georgian retained a superseded verbose explanation that overclaims page-wide accessibility and uses deficit framing. The replacement follows the current concise, user-centered source. | verified |
| `F-ka-051` | `ka` | `tools.image.errorDefaultMessage` | changed-English synchronization / recovery copy | `"URL-бғӣ бғ“бғҗбғҗбғ‘бғ бғЈбғңбғҗ бғЁбғ”бғӘбғ“бғқбғӣбғҗ. бғЎбғӘбғҗбғ“бғ”бғ— бғЎбғ®бғ•бғҗ бғ¬бғ§бғҗбғ бғқ бғҗбғң бғ—бғҗбғ•бғҳбғ“бғҗбғң бғҗбғўбғ•бғҳбғ бғ—бғ”бғ— бғӨбғҗбғҳбғҡбғҳ."` | `"бғЎбғЈбғ бғҗбғ—бғҳ бғҗбғӣ URL-бғҳбғ“бғҗбғң бғ•бғ”бғ  бғ©бғҗбғҳбғўбғ•бғҳбғ бғ—бғҗ. бғЎбғӘбғҗбғ“бғ”бғ— бғЎбғ®бғ•бғҗ бғ¬бғ§бғҗбғ бғқ бғҗбғң бғ®бғ”бғҡбғҗбғ®бғҡбғҗ бғҗбғўбғ•бғҳбғ бғ—бғ”бғ— бғӨбғҗбғҳбғҡбғҳ."` | The failure is that the image could not be loaded from the URL, not that a URL itself вҖңreturned an error.вҖқ The recovery actions remain intact. | verified |
| `F-ka-052` | `ka` | `tools.image.errorRetry` | action terminology | `"бғ’бғҗбғӣбғ”бғқбғ бғ”бғ‘бғҗ"` | `"бғ®бғ”бғҡбғҗбғ®бғҡбғҗ бғӘбғ“бғҗ"` | `бғ’бғҗбғӣбғ”бғқбғ бғ”бғ‘бғҗ` means repetition; this button retries a failed operation. `бғ®бғ”бғҡбғҗбғ®бғҡбғҗ бғӘбғ“бғҗ` states that recovery action directly. | verified |

| `F-ka-076` | `ka` | `tools.table.dragToAddRemoveColumns` | action semantics / caller gesture distinction | `"бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғҳбғўбғҗбғңбғ”бғ— бғЎбғ•бғ”бғўбғ”бғ‘бғҳбғЎ бғ“бғҗбғЎбғҗбғӣбғҗбғўбғ”бғ‘бғҡбғҗбғ“ бғҗбғң бғ¬бғҗбғЎбғҗбғЁбғҡбғ”бғҡбғҗбғ“"` | `"бғ©бғҗбғ•бғҡбғ”бғ‘бғҳбғ— бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғҳбғўбғҗбғңбғ”бғ— бғЎбғ•бғ”бғўбғ”бғ‘бғҳбғЎ бғ“бғҗбғЎбғҗбғӣбғҗбғўбғ”бғ‘бғҡбғҗбғ“ бғҗбғң бғ¬бғҗбғЎбғҗбғЁбғҡбғ”бғҡбғҗбғ“"` | The table control presents this drag instruction directly beside a distinct click instruction. The explicit `бғ©бғҗбғ•бғҡбғ”бғ‘бғҳбғ— бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғҳбғўбғҗбғңбғ”бғ—` names the drag gesture unambiguously and keeps the paired row/column controls consistent. | verified |
| `F-ka-077` | `ka` | `blockSettings.lastEditedBy` | runtime name interpolation / Georgian suffix allomorphy | `"бғ‘бғқбғҡбғқбғЎ бғ бғ”бғ“бғҗбғҘбғўбғҳбғ бғ“бғҗ {name}-бғҳбғЎ бғӣбғҳбғ”бғ "` | `"бғ‘бғқбғҡбғқ бғ бғ”бғ“бғҗбғҘбғўбғқбғ бғҳ: {name}"` | `resolveUser()` supplies unrestricted display names. A fixed genitive `-бғҳбғЎ` suffix produces malformed forms for vowel-final Georgian names such as `бғңбғҳбғңбғқ` and cannot safely inflect arbitrary external names. The footerвҖҷs next line supplies the date, so the suffix-free role label вҖңLast editor: NameвҖқ preserves attribution explicitly without mutating the placeholder. | verified |
| `F-ka-078` | `ka` | `tools.image.resetZoom` | context / product terminology | `"бғӣбғҗбғЎбғЁбғўбғҗбғ‘бғҳбғЎ бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғўбғ•бғҳбғ бғ—бғ•бғҗ"` | `"бғӣбғҗбғЎбғЁбғўбғҗбғ‘бғҳбғЎ бғЎбғҗбғ¬бғ§бғҳбғЎбғ–бғ” бғ“бғҗбғ‘бғ бғЈбғңбғ”бғ‘бғҗ"` | This label names the lightboxвҖҷs `100%` reset control, not a restart or reload. MozillaвҖҷs Georgian browser UI uses the same вҖңreturn to initial sizeвҖқ construction in [`бғЎбғҗбғ¬бғ§бғҳбғЎ бғ–бғқбғӣбғҗбғ–бғ” бғ“бғҗбғ‘бғ бғЈбғңбғ”бғ‘бғҗ`](https://github.com/mozilla-l10n/firefox-l10n/blob/main/ka/browser/chrome/browser/customizableui/customizableWidgets.properties); retaining `бғӣбғҗбғЎбғЁбғўбғҗбғ‘бғҳ` makes this image-toolbar action unambiguously about zoom. | verified |
| `F-ka-079` | `ka` | `tools.image.cropReset` | context / product terminology | `"бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғўбғ•бғҳбғ бғ—бғ•бғҗ"` | `"бғЎбғҗбғ¬бғ§бғҳбғЎбғ–бғ” бғ“бғҗбғ‘бғ бғЈбғңбғ”бғ‘бғҗ"` | This visible crop-editor action returns the crop rectangle to the largest centered selection allowed by the currently selected ratio while retaining the current ratio and shape; it does not restart anything. MozillaвҖҷs Georgian UI consistently renders reset-to-default actions as [`бғңбғҗбғ’бғЈбғҡбғҳбғЎбғ®бғӣбғ”бғ•бғ–бғ” бғ“бғҗбғ‘бғ бғЈбғңбғ”бғ‘бғҗ`](https://github.com/mozilla-l10n/firefox-l10n/blob/main/ka/toolkit/toolkit/about/aboutReader.ftl) or a context-specific return to the initial state, so the concise replacement states the actual action. | verified |
| `F-ka-080` | `ka` | `a11y.blocksMoved` | runtime count/position composition / Georgian word order | `"{count} бғ‘бғҡбғқбғҷбғҳ бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғўбғҗбғңбғҳбғҡбғҳбғҗ бғһбғқбғ–бғҳбғӘбғҳбғҗбғ–бғ” {position}"` | `"бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғўбғҗбғңбғҳбғҡбғҳбғҗ {count} бғ‘бғҡбғқбғҷбғҳ. бғҗбғ®бғҗбғҡбғҳ бғһбғқбғ–бғҳбғӘбғҳбғҗ: {position}."` | `DragA11y` supplies a cardinal count and a one-based destination. The current `бғһбғқбғ–бғҳбғӘбғҳбғҗбғ–бғ” {position}` leaves a bare numeral after an already-inflected noun in source-language order. Two self-contained clauses preserve both facts and keep the runtime number at a suffix-free label boundary. | verified |
| `F-ka-081` | `ka` | `a11y.blocksDuplicated` | runtime count/position composition / Georgian word order | `"{count} бғ‘бғҡбғқбғҷбғҳ бғ“бғЈбғ‘бғҡбғҳбғ бғ”бғ‘бғЈбғҡбғҳбғҗ бғһбғқбғ–бғҳбғӘбғҳбғҳбғ“бғҗбғң {position}"` | `"бғ“бғЈбғ‘бғҡбғҳбғ бғ”бғ‘бғЈбғҡбғҳбғҗ {count} бғ‘бғҡбғқбғҷбғҳ. бғҗбғЎбғҡбғ”бғ‘бғҳбғЎ бғЎбғҗбғ¬бғ§бғҳбғЎбғҳ бғһбғқбғ–бғҳбғӘбғҳбғҗ: {position}."` | `DragA11y` announces the first one-based position of the inserted duplicate run. In the current `бғһбғқбғ–бғҳбғӘбғҳбғҳбғ“бғҗбғң {position}`, the elative suffix attaches before the numeral and does not form a natural вҖңstarting at position NвҖқ phrase. The suffix-free second clause names the copies explicitly, so it cannot be mistaken for the source blocksвҖҷ original position. | verified |
| `F-ka-082` | `ka` | `tools.image.errorFileTooLarge` | runtime formatted-size composition / Georgian case boundary | `"бғЎбғЈбғ бғҗбғ—бғҳ бғ«бғҗбғҡбғҳбғҗбғң бғ“бғҳбғ“бғҳбғҗ. {size} бғҗбғӯбғҗбғ бғ‘бғ”бғ‘бғЎ {max} бғҡбғҳбғӣбғҳбғўбғЎ."` | `"бғЎбғЈбғ бғҗбғ—бғҳ бғ«бғҗбғҡбғҳбғҗбғң бғ“бғҳбғ“бғҳбғҗ. бғ–бғқбғӣбғҗ: {size}; бғҡбғҳбғӣбғҳбғўбғҳ: {max}."` | The caller substitutes formatted strings such as `3.5 MB` and `5.0 MB`. Standard Georgian marks the limit measure genitively (for example, official Georgian product copy uses [`20 MB-бғҳбғЎ бғҡбғҳбғӣбғҳбғўбғҳ`](https://help.openai.com/ka-ge/articles/20001052-file-storage-and-library-in-chatgpt)); the current English-order phrase omits that relation. Parallel suffix-free labels compose safely with every formatted unit. | verified |
| `F-ka-083` | `ka` | `tools.file.errorFileTooLarge` | runtime formatted-size composition / Georgian case boundary | `"бғӨбғҗбғҳбғҡбғҳ бғ«бғҗбғҡбғҳбғҗбғң бғ“бғҳбғ“бғҳбғҗ. {size} бғҗбғӯбғҗбғ бғ‘бғ”бғ‘бғЎ {max} бғҡбғҳбғӣбғҳбғўбғЎ."` | `"бғӨбғҗбғҳбғҡбғҳ бғ«бғҗбғҡбғҳбғҗбғң бғ“бғҳбғ“бғҳбғҗ. бғ–бғқбғӣбғҗ: {size}; бғҡбғҳбғӣбғҳбғўбғҳ: {max}."` | `uploadErrorMessage()` inserts independently formatted current and maximum sizes. | `F-lt-005` | `lt` | `toolbox.optionAddAbove` | instruction clarity / modifier-key action | `"SpustelД—kite su Option norД—dami pridД—ti virЕЎuje"` | `"SpustelД—kite laikydami nuspaudДҷ klaviЕЎД… Option, kad pridД—tumД—te aukЕЎДҚiau"` | The source requires holding Option while clicking; the old instrumental phrase did not express that action and used absolute вҖңat the topвҖқ instead of вҖңabove.вҖқ | verified |

| `F-lt-008` | `lt` | `tools.colorPicker.colorSwatchLabel` | accessibility / runtime-token boundary | `"{mode} {color}"` | `"{mode}: {color}"` | The colon separates the color axis from the runtime color name and prevents the ARIA label from reading as an accidental noun phrase. | verified |
| `F-lt-009` | `lt` | `a11y.dragStartedMultiple` | accessibility / count-neutral grammar | `"Velkama {count} blokЕі"` | `"VelkamЕі blokЕі: {count}"` | The old finite verb cannot agree with every runtime count. The label-before-number construction is grammatical for arbitrary values. | verified |
| `F-lt-010` | `lt` | `a11y.blocksMoved` | accessibility / count-neutral grammar | `"{count} blokЕі perkelta ДҜ pozicijД… {position}"` | `"Perkelta blokЕі: {count}. | `F-lt-011` | `lt` | `a11y.blocksDuplicated` | accessibility / source semantics | `"{count} blokЕі dublikuota nuo pozicijos {position}"` | `"Dubliuota blokЕі: {count}. | `F-lt-012` | `lt` | `a11y.searchResults` | accessibility / count-neutral grammar | `"{count} rezultatai"` | `"PaieЕЎkos rezultatЕі: {count}"` | The former fixed nominative plural fails for many counts. The noun-first announcement remains grammatical for every runtime value. | verified |

| `F-lt-016` | `lt` | `tools.table.insertRowAbove` | spatial terminology | `"Д®terpti eilutДҷ virЕЎuje"` | `"Д®terpti eilutДҷ aukЕЎДҚiau"` | The row is inserted relative to the current row, so вҖңaboveвҖқ is required rather than the absolute location вҖңat the top.вҖқ | verified |
| `F-lt-017` | `lt` | `tools.table.insertRowBelow` | spatial terminology | `"Д®terpti eilutДҷ apaДҚioje"` | `"Д®terpti eilutДҷ Еҫemiau"` | The row is inserted relative to the current row, so вҖңbelowвҖқ is required rather than the absolute location вҖңat the bottom.вҖқ | verified |

| `F-lt-022` | `lt` | `searchTerms.blockquote` | search terminology / compound form | `"bloko citata"` | `"blokinД— citata"` | The established Lithuanian computing adjective `blokinД—` names a block quotation naturally, whereas the old genitive phrase suggests a quotation belonging to a block. | verified |
| `F-lt-023` | `lt` | `searchTerms.citation` | search terminology / meaning | `"nuoroda"` | `"citavimas"` | `Nuoroda` means a reference or link and collides semantically with link tools. `Citavimas` names citation as required by the quote-tool alias. | verified |

| `F-lt-026` | `lt` | `tools.callout.pickRandom` | action completeness | `"Atsitiktinai"` | `"Pasirinkti atsitiktinДҜ jaustukД…"` | The former adverb does not name an action. The replacement explicitly says to select a random emoji. | verified |

| `F-lt-030` | `lt` | `tools.code.searchLanguage` | plurality / typography | `"IeЕЎkoti kalbos..."` | `"IeЕЎkoti kalbЕівҖҰ"` | The picker searches among multiple programming languages. The replacement uses the plural object and the catalogвҖҷs typographic ellipsis. | verified |

| `F-no-076` | `no` | `tools.colorPicker.defaultSwatchLabel` | grammar / placeholder order | `"{mode} {default}"` | `"{default} {mode}"` | The caller currently produces unnatural `Tekstfarge Standard`; the replacement produces `Standard tekstfarge`, matching MicrosoftвҖҷs established Norwegian phrase [standard tekstfarge](https://support.microsoft.com/nb-no/office/endre-standard-tekstfarge-skriftfarge-i-word-59f83009-12c2-4feb-b548-93621dfe6f2f). | verified |
| `F-no-077` | `no` | `tools.colorPicker.colorSwatchLabel` | grammar / placeholder order | `"{mode} {color}"` | `"{color} {mode}"` | The caller substitutes labels such as `Tekstfarge RГёd` and `Bakgrunn RГёd`; idiomatic BokmГҘl is `RГёd tekstfarge` and `RГёd bakgrunn`. | verified |
| `F-no-078` | `no` | `tools.file.previewRaw` | source synchronization / tab terminology | `"RГҘtekst"` | `"Kilde"` | The corrected source concept is the Markdown source view paired with Preview. `Kilde` is the concise user-facing tab label. | verified |
| `F-no-079` | `no` | `tools.linkPaste.mention` | action grammar / source-only contract | `"Omtale"` | `"Omtal"` | `buildPasteMenuItems` defines an action title alongside imperatives such as `Behold`, `Opprett`, and `Bygg inn`. | `F-no-080` | `no` | `tools.callout.emojiCategoryActivity` | established emoji-category terminology / number | `"Aktivitet"` | `"Aktiviteter"` | The emoji picker renders a category heading rather than a single activity; [Microsoft Teams BokmГҘl](https://support.microsoft.com/nb-no/teams/chat/send-an-emoji-gif-or-sticker-in-microsoft-teams) uses the plural category label `Aktiviteter`. | verified |
| `F-no-081` | `no` | `tools.image.previewControls` | accessibility / object context | `"Kontroller for forhГҘndsvisning"` | `"Kontroller for forhГҘndsvisning av bilde"` | The value labels the live image-preview toolbar, so the accessible name must retain the controlled image object; [AppleвҖҷs BokmГҘl guidance](https://support.apple.com/no-no/guide/pages-iphone/tana6bcd99e0/ios) corroborates the `Kontroller for вҖҰ av вҖҰ` construction. | verified |
| `F-no-082` | `no` | `toolNames.inlineCode` | tool distinction / established product terminology | `"Kode"` | `"Innebygd kode"` | The inline formatter currently shares the separate code-block toolвҖҷs generic title. | `F-no-083` | `no` | `searchTerms.number` | search alias / numbered-list semantics | `"nummer"` | `"nummerering"` | This hidden alias belongs only to the numbered-list entry. | `F-no-084` | `no` | `tools.image.navigationControls` | accessibility / group-purpose clarity | `"Bildenavigering"` | `"Navigering mellom bilder"` | The accessible group contains previous-image and next-image controls. Klicka fГ¶r att lГӨgga till ett block eller dra block hit.` A current-byte shared-caller review reopened the same unique locale/key finding because `lista` still mislabels the toggle-heading provider. Provider-neutral `block` covers both callers and requires neuter agreement `Tomt vikbart`; Notion likewise treats a toggle list as one specific [list block](https://www.notion.com/sv/help/writing-and-editing-basics). | verified |
| `F-sv-009` | `sv` | `tools.toggle.ariaLabelCollapse` | action terminology / accessibility | `"DГ¶lj"` | `"FГӨll ihop"` | The control collapses a disclosure; `DГ¶lj` only says hide and loses the paired expand/collapse model. | verified |
| `F-sv-010` | `sv` | `tools.toggle.ariaLabelExpand` | action terminology / accessibility | `"Visa"` | `"FГӨll ut"` | The control expands a disclosure; `Visa` only says show and loses the paired expand/collapse model. | verified |
| `F-sv-011` | `sv` | `tools.table.clearSelection` | context / action accuracy | `"Rensa"` | `"Rensa innehГҘll"` | Both table callers clear selected cell, row, or column contents rather than merely clearing the painted selection. | verified |
| `F-sv-012` | `sv` | `tools.table.placement` | terminology / source synchronization | `"Placering"` | `"Justering"` | The 3-by-3 control changes cell-content alignment, not the cellвҖҷs location; Microsoft Swedish uses `textjustering` for this concept. | verified |
| `F-sv-013` | `sv` | `blockSettings.copyLink` | semantics / compound terminology | `"Kopiera lГӨnk till block"` | `"Kopiera blockets lГӨnk"` | The current phrase can mean copying a link into a block; the action copies the link that belongs to this block. | verified |

| `F-sv-016` | `sv` | `a11y.blocksDuplicated` | number agreement / accessibility | `"{count} block duplicerade frГҘn position {position}"` | `"Duplicerade block: {count}. | `F-sv-017` | `sv` | `a11y.atTop` | accessibility / count neutrality / shared single/group selection | `"Blocket ГӨr hГ¶gst upp, kan inte flyttas uppГҘt"` | `"Kan inte flyttas uppГҘt. Redan hГ¶gst upp."` | This live-region key is shared by movement of one current block and a multi-block selection. | `F-sv-018` | `sv` | `a11y.atBottom` | accessibility / count neutrality / shared single/group selection | `"Blocket ГӨr lГӨngst ner, kan inte flyttas nedГҘt"` | `"Kan inte flyttas nedГҘt. | `F-sv-021` | `sv` | `a11y.blocksSelected` | number agreement / accessibility | `"{count} block markerade"` | `"Markerade block: {count}"` | Swedish participle agreement differs for one and many; the replacement is count-neutral. | verified |

| `F-sv-024` | `sv` | `a11y.navigatedToBlock` | grammar / accessibility | `"Navigerade till block"` | `"Navigerat till blocket"` | The completed status announcement requires a resultative participle rather than a finite past-tense verb without a subject, and the definite noun identifies the specific block that received focus. | verified |

| `F-th-001` | `th` | `toolNames.clearFormat` | missing key / source coverage | `missing` | `"аёҘа№үаёІаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёұаё”аёЈаё№аёӣа№Ғаёҡаёҡ"` | MicrosoftвҖҷs Thai editor UI uses the exact command [аёҘа№үаёІаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёұаё”аёЈаё№аёӣа№Ғаёҡаёҡ](https://support.microsoft.com/th-TH/PowerPoint/clear-all-text-formatting). | verified |

Microsoft Latvian likewise uses the verb [`pieminД“t`](https://support.microsoft.com/lv-lv/teams/free/chat-calling/use-mentions-to-get-someone-s-attention-in-microsoft-teams-free) for this action. | verified |
| `F-mk-002` | `mk` | `tools.toggle.bodyPlaceholder` | changed-English synchronization / action clarity | `"РҹСҖР°Р·РөРҪ СҖР°СҒРәР»РҫРҝР»РёРІ РұР»РҫРә. LibreOffice Macedonian uses the exact [`РҡР»РёРәРҪРөСӮРө вҖҰ Р·Р° РҙР° РҙРҫРҙР°РҙРөСӮРө`](https://help.libreoffice.org/latest/mk/text/simpress/02/13060000.html) construction. | verified |
| `F-mk-003` | `mk` | `blockSettings.convertWithChildrenWarning` | accessibility / count-neutral grammar / source semantics | `"РһРІРҫСҳ РұР»РҫРә СҒРҫРҙСҖР¶Рё {count} РІРіРҪРөР·РҙРөРҪРё РұР»РҫРәРҫРІРё. РҹСҖРё РәРҫРҪРІРөСҖСӮРёСҖР°СҡРө СӮРёРө СңРө РұРёРҙР°СӮ РҝСҖРөРјРөСҒСӮРөРҪРё РҪР° РҪР°СҳРІРёСҒРҫРәРҫСӮРҫ РҪРёРІРҫ. РҹСҖРҫРҙРҫР»Р¶Рё?"` | `"Р’РіРҪРөР·РҙРөРҪРё РұР»РҫРәРҫРІРё: {count}. РҹСҖРөСӮРІРҫСҖР°СҡРөСӮРҫ РҪР° РҫРІРҫСҳ РұР»РҫРә СңРө СҳР° РҝСҖРөРјРөСҒСӮРё РІРіРҪРөР·РҙРөРҪР°СӮР° СҒРҫРҙСҖР¶РёРҪР° РҪР° РҪР°СҳРІРёСҒРҫРәРҫ РҪРёРІРҫ. РҹСҖРҫРҙРҫР»Р¶РөСӮРө?"` | Label-before-count wording is safe for every runtime number, the singular source subject remains the nested content rather than an invented plural pronoun, and the question uses the locale's polite instructional register. | verified |
| `F-mk-004` | `mk` | `tools.marker.textColor` | changed-English synchronization / meaning | `"РўРөРәСҒСӮ"` | `"Р‘РҫСҳР° РҪР° СӮРөРәСҒСӮРҫСӮ"` | The source is Text color; the old value omitted the color axis and duplicated the generic text label. | verified |
| `F-mk-005` | `mk` | `tools.colorPicker.defaultSwatchLabel` | caller composition / placeholder grammar | `"{mode} {default}"` | `"{mode}: {default}"` | The picker composes an axis and runtime default label; the colon makes that relation grammatical while preserving both named placeholders. | verified |
| `F-mk-006` | `mk` | `tools.colorPicker.colorSwatchLabel` | caller composition / placeholder grammar | `"{mode} {color}"` | `"{mode}: {color}"` | The coupled non-default template uses the same grammatical axis/value boundary and preserves both runtime tokens. | verified |
| `F-mk-007` | `mk` | `tools.paragraph.placeholder` | changed-English synchronization / omitted object | `"РқР°РҝРёСҲРөСӮРө РҪРөСҲСӮРҫ РёР»Рё РҝСҖРёСӮРёСҒРҪРөСӮРө / Р·Р° РёР·РұРҫСҖ"` | `"РқР°РҝРёСҲРөСӮРө РҪРөСҲСӮРҫ РёР»Рё РҝСҖРёСӮРёСҒРҪРөСӮРө / Р·Р° РҙР° РёР·РұРөСҖРөСӮРө Р°Р»Р°СӮРәР°"` | The old prompt omitted what the slash key selects; the replacement restores the tool object and complete action. | verified |
| `F-mk-008` | `mk` | `tools.table.clearSelection` | caller scope / action clarity | `"РҳСҒСҮРёСҒСӮРё"` | `"РҳСҒСҮРёСҒСӮРё СҳР° СҒРҫРҙСҖР¶РёРҪР°СӮР°"` | The action clears selected cell contents rather than deleting cells, rows, or columns; naming the content removes that ambiguity. | verified |
| `F-mk-009` | `mk` | `tools.table.headerColumn` | table terminology / grammar | `"РҡРҫР»РҫРҪР°-РҪР°СҒР»РҫРІ"` | `"Р—Р°РіР»Р°РІРҪР° РәРҫР»РҫРҪР°"` | The old hyphenated calque is unnatural; the replacement is the normal Macedonian label for a header column. | verified |
| `F-mk-010` | `mk` | `tools.table.headerRow` | table terminology / grammar | `"Р РөРҙ-РҪР°СҒР»РҫРІ"` | `"Р—Р°РіР»Р°РІРөРҪ СҖРөРҙ"` | The replacement uses the natural header-row construction and agrees grammatically with `СҖРөРҙ`. | verified |
| `F-mk-011` | `mk` | `tools.table.placement` | source semantics / table terminology | `"РҹРҫР·РёСҶРёСҳР°"` | `"РҹРҫСҖР°РјРҪСғРІР°СҡРө"` | The control selects cell-content alignment, not an arbitrary position; the replacement matches the nine alignment choices it labels. | verified |
| `F-mk-012` | `mk` | `a11y.dragHandle` | accessibility / action completeness | `"РҹРҫРІР»РөСҮРөСӮРө Р·Р° РҝСҖРөРјРөСҒСӮСғРІР°СҡРө РҪР° РұР»РҫРә РёР»Рё РәР»РёРәРҪРөСӮРө Р·Р° РјРөРҪРё"` | `"РҹРҫРІР»РөСҮРөСӮРө Р·Р° РҙР° РіРҫ РҝСҖРөРјРөСҒСӮРёСӮРө РұР»РҫРәРҫСӮ РёР»Рё РәР»РёРәРҪРөСӮРө Р·Р° РҙР° РіРҫ РҫСӮРІРҫСҖРёСӮРө РјРөРҪРёСӮРҫ"` | The accessible handle label now states both complete actions and their objects instead of two clipped noun phrases. | verified |
| `F-mk-013` | `mk` | `a11y.dragStartedMultiple` | accessibility / count-neutral grammar | `"РЎРө РІР»РөСҮР°СӮ {count} РұР»РҫРәРҫРІРё"` | `"Р‘Р»РҫРәРҫРІРё СҲСӮРҫ СҒРө РІР»РөСҮР°СӮ: {count}"` | Moving the arbitrary count after a label avoids a fixed plural construction that is unsafe when the runtime value is 1. | verified |
| `F-mk-014` | `mk` | `a11y.blocksMoved` | accessibility / count-neutral grammar | `"{count} РұР»РҫРәРҫРІРё СҒРө РҝСҖРөРјРөСҒСӮРөРҪРё РҪР° РҝРҫР·РёСҶРёСҳР° {position}"` | `"РҹСҖРөРјРөСҒСӮРөРҪРё РұР»РҫРәРҫРІРё: {count}. | `F-mk-015` | `mk` | `a11y.blocksDuplicated` | accessibility / count-neutral grammar | `"{count} РұР»РҫРәРҫРІРё СҒРө РҙСғРҝР»РёСҖР°РҪРё РҝРҫСҮРҪСғРІР°СҳСңРё РҫРҙ РҝРҫР·РёСҶРёСҳР° {position}"` | `"Р”СғРҝР»РёСҖР°РҪРё РұР»РҫРәРҫРІРё: {count}. | `F-mk-016` | `mk` | `a11y.searchResults` | accessibility / omitted scope / count safety | `"{count} СҖРөР·СғР»СӮР°СӮРё"` | `"Р РөР·СғР»СӮР°СӮРё РҫРҙ РҝСҖРөРұР°СҖСғРІР°СҡРөСӮРҫ: {count}"` | The old announcement omitted the search scope; label-before-count wording is safe for every result count. | verified |

| `F-kn-086` | `kn` | `tools.video.ctxCopyUrlAtTime` | media semantics / action precision | `"аІӘаіҚаІ°аІёаіҚаІӨаіҒаІӨ аІёаІ®аІҜаІҰаІІаіҚаІІаІҝ аІөаіҖаІЎаІҝаІҜаіҠ URL аІЁаІ•аІІаІҝаІёаІҝ"` | `"аІӘаіҚаІ°аІёаіҚаІӨаіҒаІӨ аІӘаіҚаІІаіҮаІ¬аіҚаІҜаІҫаІ•аіҚ аІёаІ®аІҜаІөаІЁаіҚаІЁаіҒ аІ’аІіаІ—аіҠаІӮаІЎ аІөаіҖаІЎаІҝаІҜаіҠ URL аІ…аІЁаіҚаІЁаіҒ аІЁаІ•аІІаІҝаІёаІҝ"` | The caller appends the playback timestamp; the replacement cannot be mistaken for wall-clock time or вҖңcopy now.вҖқ | verified |
| `F-kn-087` | `kn` | `tools.video.ctxStats` | changed-English synchronization / domain | `"аІөаІҝаІөаІ°аІөаІҫаІҰ аІ…аІӮаІ•аІҝаІ…аІӮаІ¶аІ—аІіаіҒ"` | `"аІӘаіҚаІІаіҮаІ¬аіҚаІҜаІҫаІ•аіҚ аІ…аІӮаІ•аІҝаІ…аІӮаІ¶аІ—аІіаіҒ"` | The context command opens playback statistics; вҖңdetailed statisticsвҖқ omitted the current sourceвҖҷs domain. | verified |

| `F-ml-003` | `ml` | `tools.toggle.bodyPlaceholder` | changed-English synchronization / action clarity | `"аҙ’аҙҙаҙҝаҙһаөҚаҙһ аҙҹаөӢаҙ—аҙҝаөҫ. аҙ•аөҚаҙІаҙҝаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҚ аҙҡаөҶаҙҜаөҚаҙҜаөҒаҙ• аҙ…аҙІаөҚаҙІаөҶаҙҷаөҚаҙ•аҙҝаөҪ аҙ¬аөҚаҙІаөӢаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҒаҙ•аөҫ аҙүаҙіаөҚаҙіаҙҝаҙІаөҮаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҚ аҙҮаҙҹаөҒаҙ•."` | `"аҙ’аҙҙаҙҝаҙһаөҚаҙһ аҙҹаөӢаҙ—аҙҝаөҫ. аҙ’аҙ°аөҒ аҙ¬аөҚаҙІаөӢаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҚ аҙҡаөҮаөјаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аҙҫаө» аҙ•аөҚаҙІаҙҝаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҚ аҙҡаөҶаҙҜаөҚаҙҜаөҒаҙ• аҙ…аҙІаөҚаҙІаөҶаҙҷаөҚаҙ•аҙҝаөҪ аҙ¬аөҚаҙІаөӢаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҒаҙ•аөҫ аҙҮаҙөаҙҝаҙҹаөҮаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҚ аҙөаҙІаҙҝаҙҡаөҚаҙҡаҙҝаҙҹаөҒаҙ•."` | The replacement names the explicit singular click result, plural drag object, and destination while retaining formal Malayalam UI imperatives attested in [Google's product help](https://support.google.com/youtube/answer/112085?hl=ml). | verified |

| `F-ml-017` | `ml` | `a11y.dragStartedMultiple` | accessibility / count-neutral runtime grammar | `"{count} аҙ¬аөҚаҙІаөӢаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҒаҙ•аөҫ аҙөаҙІаҙҝаҙҡаөҚаҙҡаҙҝаҙҹаөҒаҙЁаөҚаҙЁаөҒ"` | `"аҙөаҙІаҙҝаҙҡаөҚаҙҡаҙҝаҙҹаөҒаҙЁаөҚаҙЁ аҙ¬аөҚаҙІаөӢаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҒаҙ•аҙіаөҒаҙҹаөҶ аҙҺаҙЈаөҚаҙЈаҙӮ: {count}"` | Label-before-value clauses preserve every caller placeholder and remain grammatical for arbitrary counts, positions, and totals. | verified |

| `F-ml-056` | `ml` | `tools.image.altDescription` | changed-English synchronization / accessibility | `"аҙҲ аҙҡаҙҝаҙӨаөҚаҙ°аҙӮ аҙөаҙҝаҙөаҙ°аҙҝаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аҙҫаө» alt аҙҹаөҶаҙ•аөҚаҙёаөҚаҙұаөҚаҙұаөҚ аҙҡаөҮаөјаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҒаҙ•. аҙҮаҙӨаөҚ аҙЁаҙҝаҙҷаөҚаҙҷаҙіаөҒаҙҹаөҶ аҙӘаөҮаҙңаҙҝаҙЁаөҶ аҙ•аҙҫаҙҙаөҚаҙҡаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҒаҙұаҙөаөҒаҙіаөҚаҙіаҙөаөјаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөӢ аҙ•аҙҫаҙҙаөҚаҙҡаҙҜаҙҝаҙІаөҚаҙІаҙҫаҙӨаөҚаҙӨаҙөаөјаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөӢ аҙ•аөӮаҙҹаөҒаҙӨаөҪ аҙҶаҙ•аөҚаҙёаҙёаөҚаҙёаҙ¬аҙҝаҙіаҙҫаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҒаҙЁаөҚаҙЁаөҒ."` | `"аҙҲ аҙҡаҙҝаҙӨаөҚаҙ°аҙӮ аҙ•аҙҫаҙЈаҙҫаө» аҙ•аҙҙаҙҝаҙҜаҙҫаҙӨаөҚаҙӨаҙөаөјаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аҙҫаҙҜаҙҝ аҙөаҙҝаҙөаҙ°аҙҝаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҒаҙ•."` | The concise instruction matches the current source and directly explains that the description serves people who cannot see the image. | verified |
| `F-ml-057` | `ml` | `tools.image.previewControls` | accessibility / object scope | `"аҙӘаөҚаҙ°аҙҝаҙөаөҚаҙҜаөӮ аҙЁаҙҝаҙҜаҙЁаөҚаҙӨаөҚаҙ°аҙЈаҙҷаөҚаҙҷаөҫ"` | `"аҙҡаҙҝаҙӨаөҚаҙ° аҙӘаөҚаҙ°аҙҝаҙөаөҚаҙҜаөӮ аҙЁаҙҝаҙҜаҙЁаөҚаҙӨаөҚаҙ°аҙЈаҙҷаөҚаҙҷаөҫ"` | The accessible group label now restores the image scope rather than announcing generic preview controls. | verified |
| `F-ml-058` | `ml` | `tools.image.errorDefaultMessage` | error semantics / source synchronization | `"URL аҙ’аҙ°аөҒ аҙӘаҙҝаҙ¶аҙ•аөҚ аҙЁаөҪаҙ•аҙҝ. аҙ®аҙұаөҚаҙұаөҠаҙ°аөҒ аҙүаҙұаҙөаҙҝаҙҹаҙӮ аҙӘаҙ°аөҖаҙ•аөҚаҙ·аҙҝаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҒаҙ• аҙ…аҙІаөҚаҙІаөҶаҙҷаөҚаҙ•аҙҝаөҪ аҙ«аҙҜаөҪ аҙөаөҖаҙЈаөҚаҙҹаөҒаҙӮ аҙ…аҙӘаөҚвҖҢаҙІаөӢаҙЎаөҚ аҙҡаөҶаҙҜаөҚаҙҜаөҒаҙ•."` | `"аҙҲ URL-аөҪ аҙЁаҙҝаҙЁаөҚаҙЁаөҚ аҙҡаҙҝаҙӨаөҚаҙ°аҙӮ аҙІаөӢаҙЎаөҚ аҙҡаөҶаҙҜаөҚаҙҜаҙҫаҙЁаҙҫаҙҜаҙҝаҙІаөҚаҙІ. аҙ®аҙұаөҚаҙұаөҠаҙ°аөҒ аҙүаҙұаҙөаҙҝаҙҹаҙӮ аҙӘаҙ°аөҖаҙ•аөҚаҙ·аҙҝаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҒаҙ• аҙ…аҙІаөҚаҙІаөҶаҙҷаөҚаҙ•аҙҝаөҪ аҙ«аҙҜаөҪ аҙөаөҖаҙЈаөҚаҙҹаөҒаҙӮ аҙ…аҙӘаөҚвҖҢаҙІаөӢаҙЎаөҚ аҙҡаөҶаҙҜаөҚаҙҜаөҒаҙ•."` | The fallback now reports the actual image-load failure from the URL and preserves both recovery actions without inventing a URL-generated error. | verified |

| `F-ml-090` | `ml` | `tools.video.toggleTimeDisplay` | changed-English synchronization / media action | `"аҙёаҙ®аҙҜ аҙӘаөҚаҙ°аҙҰаөјаҙ¶аҙЁаҙӮ аҙҹаөӢаҙ—аҙҝаөҫ аҙҡаөҶаҙҜаөҚаҙҜаөҒаҙ•"` | `"аҙ•аҙҙаҙҝаҙһаөҚаҙһ аҙёаҙ®аҙҜаҙӨаөҚаҙӨаҙҝаҙЁаөҒаҙӮ аҙ¶аөҮаҙ·аҙҝаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҒаҙЁаөҚаҙЁ аҙёаҙ®аҙҜаҙӨаөҚаҙӨаҙҝаҙЁаөҒаҙӮ аҙҮаҙҹаҙҜаҙҝаөҪ аҙ®аҙҫаҙұаөҒаҙ•"` | The accessible action now states the actual elapsed and remaining time modes instead of generic toggle jargon. | verified |

| `F-ml-094` | `ml` | `tools.database.checkboxChecked` | accessibility / checkbox-state semantics | `"аҙӨаҙҝаҙ°аҙһаөҚаҙһаөҶаҙҹаөҒаҙӨаөҚаҙӨаөҒ"` | `"аҙӘаҙ°аҙҝаҙ¶аөӢаҙ§аҙҝаҙҡаөҚаҙҡаҙӨаөҚ"` | The read-only checkbox exposes checked state, not row selection; the reviewed platform state term preserves that distinction. | verified |

| `F-mr-002` | `mr` | `tools.toggle.bodyPlaceholder` | changed-English synchronization / state and action clarity | `"аӨ°аӨҝаӨ•аӨҫаӨ®аӨҫ аӨёаӨӮаӨ•аҘҒаӨҡаӨҝаӨӨ аӨ¬аҘҚаӨІаҘүаӨ•. аӨ•аҘҚаӨІаӨҝаӨ• аӨ•аӨ°аӨҫ аӨ•аӨҝаӨӮаӨөаӨҫ аӨҶаӨӨ аӨ¬аҘҚаӨІаҘүаӨ• аӨҹаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫ."` | `"аӨ°аӨҝаӨ•аӨҫаӨ®аӨҫ аӨҹаҘүаӨ—аӨІ. аӨ¬аҘҚаӨІаҘүаӨ• аӨңаҘӢаӨЎаӨЈаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨёаӨҫаӨ аҘҖ аӨ•аҘҚаӨІаӨҝаӨ• аӨ•аӨ°аӨҫ аӨ•аӨҝаӨӮаӨөаӨҫ аӨ¬аҘҚаӨІаҘүаӨ• аӨҜаҘҮаӨҘаҘҮ аӨ“аӨўаӨҫ."` | [`toggle-lifecycle.ts`](../../src/tools/toggle/toggle-lifecycle.ts) shows this message only while the toggle is open and empty, so `аӨёаӨӮаӨ•аҘҒаӨҡаӨҝаӨӨ аӨ¬аҘҚаӨІаҘүаӨ•` falsely described a collapsed block. The replacement uses the established `аӨҹаҘүаӨ—аӨІ` product term and states both click-to-add and drag-here actions while preserving the official Android Marathi [`аӨ“аӨўаӨҫ`](https://support.google.com/android/answer/9346420?hl=mr) drag term. | verified |
| `F-ne-002` | `ne` | `tools.toggle.bodyPlaceholder` | changed-English synchronization / terminology / action clarity | `"аӨ–аӨҫаӨІаҘҖ аӨ®аҘӢаӨЎаҘҚаӨЁаҘҮаҘӨ аӨ¬аҘҚаӨІаӨ•аӨ№аӨ°аҘӮ аӨӯаӨҝаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨ•аҘҚаӨІаӨҝаӨ• аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨЁаҘҒаӨ№аҘӢаӨёаҘҚ аӨөаӨҫ аӨӨаӨҫаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁаҘҒаӨ№аҘӢаӨёаҘҚаҘӨ"` | `"аӨ–аӨҫаӨІаҘҖ аӨҹаӨ—аӨІаҘӨ аӨ¬аҘҚаӨІаӨ• аӨҘаӨӘаҘҚаӨЁ аӨ•аҘҚаӨІаӨҝаӨ• аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨЁаҘҒаӨ№аҘӢаӨёаҘҚ аӨөаӨҫ аӨ¬аҘҚаӨІаӨ•аӨ№аӨ°аҘӮ аӨҜаӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ аӨӨаӨҫаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁаҘҒаӨ№аҘӢаӨёаҘҚаҘӨ"` | The previously verified sentence still distinguishes clicking to add one block from dragging blocks here. The fresh audit changes only the standalone control noun: `аӨ®аҘӢаӨЎаҘҚаӨЁаҘҮ` is an infinitival вҖңto fold,вҖқ while official Nepali product UI uses `аӨҹаӨ—аӨІ`. [YouTube Help вҖ” toggle UI](https://support.google.com/youtube/answer/10788593?co=GENIE.Platform%3DAndroid&hl=ne). | verified |

[National Institute of Korean Language вҖ” pronunciation-based particle selection](https://www.korean.go.kr/front/onlineQna/onlineQnaView.do?mn_id=261&pageIndex=1&qna_seq=317037) | verified |

| `F-mn-049` | `mn` | `searchTerms.callout` | search semantics / consistency | `"СӮРҫРҙРҫСҖС…РҫР№Р»РҫР»"` | `"СӮРҫРҙСҖСғСғР»РіР°"` | The live alias now finds the callout by the same reviewed concept used in the tool name and placeholder, rather than by definition. | verified |
| `F-mn-050` | `mn` | `searchTerms.blockquote` | compound grammar / search quality | `"РұР»РҫРә РёСҲР»СҚР»"` | `"РёСҲР»СҚР»РёР№РҪ РұР»РҫРә"` | The possessive construction naturally means a block containing a quotation; the former noun order was an unnatural calque. | verified |
| `F-mn-051` | `mn` | `tools.callout.placeholder` | product terminology | `"РўРҫРҙРҫСҖС…РҫР№Р»РҫР»"` | `"РўРҫРҙСҖСғСғР»РіР°"` | The editable placeholder names callout content rather than a definition and stays consistent with the tool label and search alias. | `F-mn-052` | `mn` | `tools.callout.addEmoji` | changed-English synchronization / object scope | `"РӯРјРҫР¶Рё РҪСҚРјСҚС…"` | `"Р”ТҜСҖСҒ РҪСҚРјСҚС…"` | English now names the callout icon, which may be selected through the emoji picker; the replacement labels the actual icon action rather than narrowing it to an emoji object. | verified |

| `F-mn-056` | `mn` | `tools.database.renameColumn` | grammar / action precision | `"Р‘Р°РіР°РҪСӢ РҪСҚСҖ СҒРҫР»РёС…"` | `"Р‘Р°РіР°РҪСӢРҪ РҪСҚСҖРёР№Рі У©У©СҖСҮР»У©С…"` | The replacement uses the reviewed possessive form, marks the name as the object, and expresses renaming rather than swapping it. | verified |

| `F-mn-060` | `mn` | `tools.code.searchLanguage` | punctuation / input semantics | `"РҘСҚР» С…Р°Р№С…..."` | `"РҘСҚР» С…Р°Р№С…вҖҰ"` | The search field retains its concise language scope and replaces three ASCII periods with the catalogвҖҷs required Unicode ellipsis. | verified |

| `F-sw-002` | `sw` | `tools.toggle.bodyPlaceholder` | grammar / changed-English synchronization / number | `"Kinachokunjuka tupu. Bofya au dondosha vizuizi ndani."` | `"Kinachokunjuka ni kitupu. The replacement also contrasts singular `kizuizi` click creation with plural `vizuizi` active dragging and an explicit destination. | verified |
| `F-th-002` | `th` | `tools.toggle.bodyPlaceholder` | shared-caller scope / changed-English synchronization | `"аёҡаёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒаёһаёұаёҡаё§а№ҲаёІаёҮа№ҖаёӣаёҘа№ҲаёІ аё„аёҘаёҙаёҒаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаё§аёІаёҮаёҡаёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒа№„аё§а№үаёӮа№үаёІаёҮа№ғаёҷ"` | `"аёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳаёһаёұаёҡа№„аё”а№үаёҷаёөа№үаё§а№ҲаёІаёҮа№ҖаёӣаёҘа№ҲаёІ аё„аёҘаёҙаёҒа№Җаёһаё·а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎаёҡаёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒ аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёҘаёІаёҒаёҡаёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒаёЎаёІаё—аёөа№Ҳаёҷаёөа№Ҳ"` | `аёҡаёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒаёһаёұаёҡ` is an incomplete technical classification and the old actions omit creation and active dragging. Provider-neutral `аёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳаёһаёұаёҡа№„аё”а№ү` follows Microsoft Thai's [collapsible-section pattern](https://support.microsoft.com/th-th/office/%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%9E%E0%B8%B4%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%A1%E0%B8%AA%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%99%E0%B9%81%E0%B8%A5%E0%B8%B0%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%AD%E0%B8%A5%E0%B8%B1%E0%B8%A1%E0%B8%99%E0%B9%8C%E0%B8%9A%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%AB%E0%B8%99%E0%B9%89%E0%B8%B2%E0%B8%97%E0%B8%B5%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%97%E0%B8%B1%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%AA%E0%B8%A1%E0%B8%B1%E0%B8%A2%E0%B8%82%E0%B8%AD%E0%B8%87-sharepoint-a54ecb22-ce73-46db-8d08-95a810ffcbde), while bare `аёҡаёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒ` is number-neutral across both actions. | verified |

| `F-et-005` | `et` | `tools.colorPicker.colorSwatchLabel` | accessibility / composed-label grammar | `"{mode} {color}"` | `"{color} {mode}"` | The proposed colon would render вҖңTeksti vГӨrv: PunaneвҖқ, conflicting with lowercase after a colon. | `F-et-012` | `et` | `tools.callout.addEmoji` | source synchronization / terminology | `"Lisa emoji"` | `"Lisa ikoon"` | вҖңIkoonвҖқ preserves the broader product action instead of narrowing it to one symbol class. | verified |
| `F-et-013` | `et` | `tools.callout.filterEmojis` | search clarity / terminology | `"FiltreeriвҖҰ"` | `"Otsi emojisidвҖҰ"` | It names both the action and search object, unlike vague вҖңFiltreeriвҖҰвҖқ, and uses the attested Estonian emoji inflection and proper ellipsis. | verified |
| `F-et-014` | `et` | `tools.callout.noEmojisFound` | terminology / naturalness | `"Emotikone ei leitud"` | `"Emojisid ei leitud"` | Emoji pictographs are not emoticons made chiefly from punctuation; the corrected noun matches the actual dataset. | verified |
| `F-et-015` | `et` | `tools.callout.pickRandom` | action clarity | `"Juhuslik"` | `"Vali juhuslik emoji"` | The imperative states the button action and object; standalone вҖңJuhuslikвҖқ only says вҖңrandomвҖқ. | verified |
| `F-et-016` | `et` | `tools.callout.emojiCategoryPeople` | category scope / number | `"NaerunГӨgu ja inimesed"` | `"NaerunГӨod ja inimesed"` | The plural вҖңNaerunГӨodвҖқ agrees with the plural category scope and with English вҖңSmileysвҖқ. | verified |
| `F-et-017` | `et` | `tools.callout.colorDefault` | capitalization | `"vaikimisi"` | `"Vaikimisi"` | For the retained source-only вҖңDefaultвҖқ label, sentence-style UI capitalization requires an initial capital. The translation correction is valid even though the matrixвҖҷs caller attribution is not. | verified |
| `F-et-018` | `et` | `tools.quote.defaultSize` | capitalization | `"vaikimisi"` | `"Vaikimisi"` | Standalone localizable UI labels capitalize the first word; the lowercase current value is inconsistent in that menu. | verified |
| `F-et-019` | `et` | `tools.code.searchLanguage` | punctuation / search clarity | `"Otsi keelt..."` | `"Otsi keeltвҖҰ"` | Partitive singular вҖңkeeltвҖқ is idiomatic here, so plural вҖңkeeliвҖқ is not an improvement. Only the three-dot punctuation needs replacement with the required ellipsis character. | verified |
| `F-et-020` | `et` | `tools.link.jumpToSection` | terminology / naturalness | `"Mine sektsiooni"` | `"Mine jaotisse"` | вҖңJaotisвҖқ is the established Estonian document-UI term; вҖңsektsioonвҖқ is an avoidable loan in this context. | verified |
| `F-et-021` | `et` | `tools.link.linkTitle` | context / terminology | `"Lingi pealkiri"` | `"Lingi tekst"` | вҖңLingi tekstвҖқ names the actual field; вҖңLingi pealkiriвҖқ incorrectly implies a title attribute or document title. | verified |
| `F-et-022` | `et` | `tools.image.altDescription` | terminology / naturalness | `"Lisa alt-tekst, mis kirjeldab pilti. Nii muutub leht ligipГӨГӨsetavamaks vaegnГӨgijatele ja pimedatele."` | `"Kirjelda seda pilti inimestele, kes seda ei nГӨe."` | It follows the current sourceвҖҷs direct, purpose-led wording without narrowing beneficiaries to diagnoses and retains sentence punctuation. | verified |
| `F-et-023` | `et` | `tools.image.previewControls` | accessibility / specificity | `"Eelvaate juhtnupud"` | `"Pildi eelvaate juhtnupud"` | Adding вҖңPildiвҖқ makes the accessible name self-contained and restores the source scope. | verified |
| `F-et-024` | `et` | `tools.image.errorSourceOffline` | natural error copy | `"LГӨhtefail vГөib olla teisaldatud vГөi vГөrguГјhenduseta."` | `"LГӨhtefail vГөib olla teisaldatud vГөi kГӨttesaamatu."` | A file itself cannot naturally be вҖңvГөrguГјhendusetaвҖқ. The amendment expresses unavailability without the proposalвҖҷs unsupported вҖңenamвҖқ (вҖңno longerвҖқ) permanence. | verified |
| `F-et-025` | `et` | `tools.image.errorDefaultMessage` | natural error copy | `"URL tagastas vea. Proovi teist allikat vГөi lae fail uuesti Гјles."` | `"Pilti ei saanud sellelt URL-ilt laadida. Proovi teist allikat vГөi laadi fail uuesti Гјles."` | It identifies the failed object and source, preserves both recovery options, uses standard вҖңlaadiвҖқ, and retains required sentence punctuation. | verified |
| `F-et-026` | `et` | `tools.database.viewTypeListDescription` | terminology / naturalness | `"Lihtne lineaarne vaade"` | `"Kuva Гјksused lihtsas loendis"` | The action-led description restores вҖңitemsвҖқ and вҖңlistвҖқ and aligns structurally with its sibling view description. | verified |
| `F-et-027` | `et` | `tools.bookmark.loading` | terminology / naturalness | `"Eelvaate laadimine"` | `"Lingi eelvaate laadimineвҖҰ"` | It restores the source object вҖңlinkвҖқ and uses the standard no-space ellipsis for ongoing work. | verified |
| `F-et-028` | `et` | `tools.embed.empty` | context / read-only state | `"Manustamiseks kleebi link"` | `"Manustamislink puudub"` | A read-only empty state must report absence, not instruct the user to paste a link they cannot enter. | verified |
| `F-et-029` | `et` | `tools.linkPaste.mention` | terminology / naturalness | `"Mainimine"` | `"Maini"` | The imperative вҖңMainiвҖқ names the action; the noun вҖңMainimineвҖқ names an activity and is inconsistent with command labels. | verified |
| `F-et-030` | `et` | `tools.file.previewRender` | context / terminology | `"Vaade"` | `"Eelvaade"` | вҖңEelvaadeвҖқ precisely translates Preview and matches established Estonian UI terminology. | verified |
| `F-et-031` | `et` | `tools.video.alignmentLeft` | context / control terminology | `"Vasak"` | `"Joonda vasakule"` | The imperative exactly expresses вҖңAlign leftвҖқ and matches official Estonian alignment commands. | verified |
| `F-et-032` | `et` | `tools.video.alignmentCenter` | context / control terminology | `"Keskel"` | `"Joonda keskele"` | The imperative exactly expresses вҖңAlign centerвҖқ; locative вҖңKeskelвҖқ only describes a state. | verified |
| `F-et-033` | `et` | `tools.video.alignmentRight` | context / control terminology | `"Parem"` | `"Joonda paremale"` | The imperative exactly expresses вҖңAlign rightвҖқ and matches official Estonian alignment commands. | verified |
| `F-et-034` | `et` | `tools.audio.alignmentLeft` | context / control terminology | `"Vasak"` | `"Joonda vasakule"` | The imperative exactly expresses вҖңAlign leftвҖқ and keeps audio and video controls aligned. | verified |
| `F-et-035` | `et` | `tools.audio.alignmentCenter` | context / control terminology | `"Keskel"` | `"Joonda keskele"` | The imperative exactly expresses вҖңAlign centerвҖқ; locative вҖңKeskelвҖқ only describes a state. | verified |
| `F-et-036` | `et` | `tools.audio.alignmentRight` | context / control terminology | `"Parem"` | `"Joonda paremale"` | The imperative exactly expresses вҖңAlign rightвҖқ and keeps audio and video controls aligned. | verified |
| `F-et-037` | `et` | `tools.audio.coverSourceAria` | accessibility / specificity | `"Pildi allikas"` | `"Kaanepildi allikas"` | вҖңKaanepildiвҖқ supplies the missing object and distinguishes this control from unrelated image-source fields. | verified |
| `F-et-038` | `et` | `a11y.allBlocksSelected` | accessibility / number | `"KГөik plokid valitud, {count} plokki"` | `"KГөik plokid valitud. Kokku: {count}"` | The label-first count avoids вҖң1 plokkiвҖқ, preserves {count}, and separates the complete status statements with correct punctuation. | verified |
| `F-et-039` | `et` | `a11y.navigatedToBlock` | accessibility / terminology | `"Liikuti plokile"` | `"Liiguti plokile"` | вҖңLiikutiвҖқ is not the past impersonal form of liikuma; вҖңLiigutiвҖқ fixes the spelling and inflection. | verified |
| `F-et-040` | `et` | `notifier.dismiss` | action semantics | `"Loobu"` | `"Sulge"` | вҖңSulgeвҖқ names closing the notification; вҖңLoobuвҖқ means abandoning or giving something up and mislabels the control. | verified |
| `F-et-041` | `et` | `tools.video.seek` | accessibility / interactive media terminology | `"Keri"` | `"Video ajaskaala"` | The real caller is an interactive range that seeks playback, not scrolling or a passive progress bar. The earlier intermediate `Video kerimisriba` and follow-up proposal `Video edenemisriba` therefore remained inaccurate. MicrosoftвҖҷs localized video-player guidance uses [`video ajaskaala`](https://support.microsoft.com/et-ee/office/videote-trimmimine-microsoft-stream-c41f21f5-e803-4dbf-99a6-65452003a1ee); the native slider role supplies the interaction. | verified |
| `F-et-042` | `et` | `tools.video.toggleTimeDisplay` | accessibility / state clarity | `"LГјlita ajanГӨit"` | `"Vaheta mГ¶Г¶dunud ja jГӨrelejГӨГӨnud aja vahel"` | It identifies both states and the switching action; generic вҖңLГјlita ajanГӨitвҖқ does not tell assistive-technology users what changes. | verified |
| `F-et-043` | `et` | `tools.video.ctxCopyUrlAtTime` | context / playback terminology | `"Kopeeri video URL praegusel ajal"` | `"Kopeeri video URL praegusest taasesituskohast"` | The current вҖңpraegusel ajalвҖқ means вҖңnowadaysвҖқ. Adding вҖңtaasesitusвҖқ to the proposalвҖҷs ambiguous вҖңesituskohtвҖқ makes the referenced playback position explicit. | verified |
| `F-et-044` | `et` | `tools.video.ctxStats` | terminology / tone | `"Statistika asjatundjatele"` | `"Esitusstatistika"` | It replaces obsolete вҖңstatistics for expertsвҖқ wording with the neutral current Playback statistics contract and matches the localeвҖҷs established media term вҖңEsituskiirusвҖқ. | verified |
| `F-et-045` | `et` | `tools.callout.emojiSearchResults` | terminology / naturalness | `"Leiti {count} emojit"` | `"Emojivasteid: {count}"` | The label-first partitive form preserves вҖңmatchesвҖқ while avoiding the invalid вҖң1 emojitвҖқ rendering for arbitrary counts; {count} remains exact. | verified |
| `F-et-046` | `et` | `a11y.dragStarted` | accessibility / impersonal state announcement | `"Lohistab plokki"` | `"Plokki lohistatakse"` | The old third-person form implies an unstated actor. The impersonal form naturally foregrounds the block's drag state in a system announcement, following [EKI guidance](https://teatmik.eki.ee/teatmik/umbisikuline-tegumood-ja-poolt-tarind/). | verified |
| `F-et-047` | `et` | `a11y.dragStartedMultiple` | accessibility / impersonal state announcement / number | `"Lohistab {count} plokki"` | `"Lohistatakse {count} plokki"` | The caller selects this key only above one. The impersonal form fits a live-region announcement, and the numeral-governed singular partitive `plokki` follows [EKI number guidance](https://teatmik.eki.ee/teatmik/arvukirjutus/). | verified |
| `F-et-048` | `et` | `a11y.dropPosition` | accessibility / spoken numeric relation | `"Asetatakse positsioonile {position}/{total}"` | `"Asetatakse positsioonile {position}, kokku {total}"` | `Kokku` makes the aggregate explicit for speech and avoids the slash's ambiguous relationship while preserving both placeholders. The separately confirmed caller-level numeric defect cannot be corrected in translation. | verified |
| `F-et-049` | `et` | `a11y.blockMoved` | accessibility / spoken numeric relation | `"Plokk teisaldatud positsioonile {position}/{total}"` | `"Plokk teisaldatud positsioonile {position}, kokku {total}"` | The explicit aggregate reads naturally in a completion announcement and matches the existing Estonian moved-up and moved-down wording. | verified |
| `F-et-050` | `et` | `a11y.navigationModeEntered` | accessibility / localized key terminology | `"NavigeerimisreЕҫiim. Kasuta nooleklahve plokkide vahel liikumiseks, Enterit muutmiseks ja Escape'i vГӨljumiseks."` | `"NavigeerimisreЕҫiim. Kasuta nooleklahve plokkide vahel liikumiseks, muutmiseks sisestusklahvi (Enter) ja vГӨljumiseks paoklahvi (Esc)."` | The standard localized key names make the instruction natural, while the parenthetical legends preserve recognition of the physical keys. Official Microsoft accessibility copy uses the same [`sisestusklahvi (Enter)` and `paoklahvi (Esc)`](https://support.microsoft.com/et-ee/accessibility/teams/basic-tasks-using-a-screen-reader-with-microsoft-teams) forms. | verified |
| `F-et-051` | `et` | `a11y.navigationPosition` | accessibility / spoken numeric relation | `"{tool}, {position}/{total}"` | `"{tool}, positsioon {position}, kokku {total}"` | The replacement explicitly labels both the ordinal and aggregate values while remaining concise for a throttled repeated live-region announcement. | verified |
| `F-et-052` | `et` | `tools.video.caption` | media-neutral terminology | `"Pildiallkiri"` | `"Pealdis"` | The editable text belongs to video, not a still picture. Official localized [LibreOffice help](https://help.libreoffice.org/latest/et/text/swriter/01/04060000.html) uses the generic UI term `Pealdis`. | verified |
| `F-et-053` | `et` | `tools.video.toggleCaption` | media-neutral terminology / source-only coverage | `"NГӨita vГөi peida pildiallkiri"` | `"NГӨita vГөi peida pealdis"` | The source-only contract has no production caller at this revision, but it should retain the same media-neutral caption terminology as the active video and audio fields. | verified |
| `F-et-054` | `et` | `tools.audio.caption` | media-neutral terminology | `"Pildiallkiri"` | `"Pealdis"` | `Pildiallkiri` is image-specific and especially inapt for author text under an audio card. `Pealdis` is the established generic caption term and matches the existing Estonian placeholder. | verified |
| `F-et-055` | `et` | `tools.video.seekValueText` | accessibility / spoken numeric relation | `"{current} / {total}"` | `"{current}, kokku {total}"` | The media slider exposes formatted current and maximum times as `aria-valuetext`; the explicit aggregate is clearer in speech than a slash and preserves both placeholders. | verified |
| `F-fa-003` | `fa` | `blockSettings.clickAction` | composed UI grammar | `"Ъ©Щ„ЫҢЪ© Ъ©ЩҶЫҢШҜ"` | `"ШЁШ§ Ъ©Щ„ЫҢЪ©"` | As a prefix fragment it supplies the shared instrumental phrase and composes into a natural imperative in both caller forms. | verified |
| `F-fa-004` | `fa` | `blockSettings.orConjunction` | composed UI grammar | `" ЫҢШ§ Ш§ШІ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶвҖҢШЁШұ Ш§ШіШӘЩҒШ§ШҜЩҮ Ъ©ЩҶЫҢШҜ: "` | `" ЫҢШ§ Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶвҖҢШЁШұ "` | The coordinated noun phrase is grammatical under the shared В«ШЁШ§В» and preserves the caller-required leading and trailing ASCII spaces. | verified |
| `F-fa-005` | `fa` | `blockSettings.openMenuAction` | composed UI grammar | `" ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШЁШ§ШІ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҶ Щ…ЩҶЩҲ"` | `" Щ…ЩҶЩҲ ШұШ§ ШЁШ§ШІ Ъ©ЩҶЫҢШҜ"` | This suffix supplies the imperative predicate for both composed tooltips and preserves its required leading ASCII space. | verified |
| `F-fa-006` | `fa` | `blockSettings.dragToMove` | orthography / instruction clarity | `"ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш¬Ш§ШЁШ¬Ш§ЫҢЫҢ ШЁЪ©ШҙЫҢШҜ"` | `"ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш¬Ш§ШЁЩҮвҖҢШ¬Ш§ЫҢЫҢ ШЁЪ©ШҙЫҢШҜ"` | The proposal corrects the standard spelling with a ZWNJ without changing the concise drag instruction. | verified |
| `F-fa-007` | `fa` | `toolbox.optionAddAbove` | shortcut / instruction clarity | `"Option-Ъ©Щ„ЫҢЪ© ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЩҒШІЩҲШҜЩҶ ШҜШұ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш§"` | `"ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЩҒШІЩҲШҜЩҶ ШҜШұ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш§ШҢ Ъ©Щ„ЫҢШҜ Option ШұШ§ ЩҶЪҜЩҮ ШҜШ§ШұЫҢШҜ ЩҲ Ъ©Щ„ЫҢЪ© Ъ©ЩҶЫҢШҜ"` | It renders modifier-click as a complete Persian instruction while retaining the literal key name required by the UI. | verified |
| `F-fa-008` | `fa` | `toolbox.ctrlAddAbove` | shortcut / instruction clarity | `"Ctrl-Ъ©Щ„ЫҢЪ© ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЩҒШІЩҲШҜЩҶ ШҜШұ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш§"` | `"ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЩҒШІЩҲШҜЩҶ ШҜШұ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш§ШҢ Ъ©Щ„ЫҢШҜ Ctrl ШұШ§ ЩҶЪҜЩҮ ШҜШ§ШұЫҢШҜ ЩҲ Ъ©Щ„ЫҢЪ© Ъ©ЩҶЫҢШҜ"` | It matches attested Persian modifier-click syntax and keeps Ctrl unchanged as a keyboard label. | verified |
| `F-fa-009` | `fa` | `toolNames.bold` | established formatting terminology | `"Ш¶Ш®ЫҢЩ…"` | `"ЩҫШұШұЩҶЪҜ"` | В«ЩҫШұШұЩҶЪҜВ» is the attested formatting command; В«Ш¶Ш®ЫҢЩ…В» describes physical thickness. | verified |
| `F-fa-010` | `fa` | `tools.marker.textColor` | terminology / specificity | `"Щ…ШӘЩҶ"` | `"ШұЩҶЪҜ ЩҶЩҲШҙШӘШ§Шұ"` | The current value omits color, but the official Persian UI label is the more precise and directly attested В«ШұЩҶЪҜ ЩҶЩҲШҙШӘШ§ШұВ». | verified |
| `F-fa-011` | `fa` | `tools.paragraph.placeholder` | instruction clarity | `"ЪҶЫҢШІЫҢ ШЁЩҶЩҲЫҢШіЫҢШҜ ЫҢШ§ / ШұШ§ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЩҶШӘШ®Ш§ШЁ ШЁШІЩҶЫҢШҜ"` | `"ЪҶЫҢШІЫҢ ШЁЩҶЩҲЫҢШіЫҢШҜ ЫҢШ§ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЩҶШӘШ®Ш§ШЁ Ш§ШЁШІШ§ШұШҢ Ъ©Щ„ЫҢШҜ / ШұШ§ ЩҒШҙШ§Шұ ШҜЩҮЫҢШҜ"` | It restores the omitted object В«Ш§ШЁШІШ§ШұВ» and uses explicit keyboard-action wording around the literal slash key. | verified |
| `F-fa-012` | `fa` | `tools.table.clearSelection` | context / action accuracy | `"ЩҫШ§Ъ© Ъ©ШұШҜЩҶ"` | `"ЩҫШ§Ъ© Ъ©ШұШҜЩҶ Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲШ§"` | The added object distinguishes clearing cell contents from deleting the selected rows, columns, or cells. | verified |
| `F-fa-013` | `fa` | `tools.table.comfortableText` | context / mode terminology | `"Щ…ШӘЩҶ ШұШ§ШӯШӘ"` | `"Щ…ШӘЩҶ Щ…Ш№Щ…ЩҲЩ„ЫҢ"` | The comfortable mode only restores the regular editor font size; it does not increase spacing, so the input proposal would misdescribe behavior. | verified |
| `F-fa-014` | `fa` | `tools.table.placement` | context / control terminology | `"Щ…ЩҲЩӮШ№ЫҢШӘ"` | `"ШӘШұШ§ШІ"` | The picker controls horizontal and vertical alignment, for which В«ШӘШұШ§ШІВ» is the exact UI category rather than generic position. | verified |
| `F-fa-015` | `fa` | `a11y.dragHandle` | accessibility / clarity | `"ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш¬Ш§ШЁШ¬Ш§ЫҢЫҢ ШЁЩ„ЩҲЪ© ШЁЪ©ШҙЫҢШҜ ЫҢШ§ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…ЩҶЩҲ Ъ©Щ„ЫҢЪ© Ъ©ЩҶЫҢШҜ"` | `"ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш¬Ш§ШЁЩҮвҖҢШ¬Ш§ЫҢЫҢ ШЁЩ„ЩҲЪ© ШЁЪ©ШҙЫҢШҜ ЫҢШ§ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШЁШ§ШІ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҶ Щ…ЩҶЩҲ Ъ©Щ„ЫҢЪ© Ъ©ЩҶЫҢШҜ"` | It fixes standard orthography and states the click action as opening, not merely being 'for', the menu. | verified |
| `F-fa-016` | `fa` | `a11y.searchResults` | accessibility / number | `"{count} ЩҶШӘЫҢШ¬ЩҮ"` | `"ЩҶШӘШ§ЫҢШ¬ Ш¬ШіШӘШ¬ЩҲ: {count}"` | It restores the search context for screen-reader announcements and preserves the {count} placeholder exactly once. | verified |
| `F-fa-017` | `fa` | `a11y.navigationModeEntered` | accessibility / clarity | `"ШӯШ§Щ„ШӘ ЩҫЫҢЩ…Ш§ЫҢШҙ. ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш¬Ш§ШЁШ¬Ш§ЫҢЫҢ ШЁЫҢЩҶ ШЁЩ„ЩҲЪ©вҖҢЩҮШ§ Ш§ШІ Ъ©Щ„ЫҢШҜЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш¬ЩҮШӘвҖҢЩҶЩ…Ш§ШҢ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҲЫҢШұШ§ЫҢШҙ Ш§ШІ Enter ЩҲ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш®ШұЩҲШ¬ Ш§ШІ Escape Ш§ШіШӘЩҒШ§ШҜЩҮ Ъ©ЩҶЫҢШҜ."` | `"ШӯШ§Щ„ШӘ ЩҫЫҢЩ…Ш§ЫҢШҙ. ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш¬Ш§ШЁЩҮвҖҢШ¬Ш§ЫҢЫҢ ШЁЫҢЩҶ ШЁЩ„ЩҲЪ©вҖҢЩҮШ§ Ш§ШІ Ъ©Щ„ЫҢШҜЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш¬ЩҮШӘвҖҢЩҶЩ…Ш§ШҢ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҲЫҢШұШ§ЫҢШҙ Ш§ШІ Enter ЩҲ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш®ШұЩҲШ¬ Ш§ШІ Escape Ш§ШіШӘЩҒШ§ШҜЩҮ Ъ©ЩҶЫҢШҜ."` | This is a narrowly justified orthographic correction to standard В«Ш¬Ш§ШЁЩҮвҖҢШ¬Ш§ЫҢЫҢВ»; key names remain literal. | verified |

| `F-fil-100` | `fil` | `tools.embed.urlPlaceholder` | orthography / prospective aspect / caller fit | `"Mag-paste ng link na ie-embedвҖҰ"` | `"Mag-paste ng link na i-e-embedвҖҰ"` | The placeholder and accessible name describe the link that will be embedded, so the prospective form needs the repeated initial vowel and hyphenated boundary before the unchanged foreign root: `i-e-embed`. The [KWF Manwal sa Masinop na Pagsulat](https://kwf.gov.ph/wp-content/uploads/MMP_Full.pdf?AxCArs=PHIQUMr) В§2.3 requires a vowel-initial root to repeat its first vowel and applies the rule even to an unrespelt foreign root. This is distinct from the locale's imperative or infinitive `i-embed`, and it matches both callers in `src/tools/link/embed/index.ts`. | verified |
| `F-nl-086` | `nl` | `tools.callout.emojiCategoryActivity` | category scope / number | `"Activiteit"` | `"Activiteiten"` | The heading groups many activities rather than naming one activity.
