Sources: [Microsoft Support вҖ” Een emoji of GIF verzenden in Microsoft Teams (gratis)](https://support.microsoft.com/nl-NL/teams/free/chat-calling/send-an-emoji-or-gif-in-microsoft-teams-free). | verified |
| `F-nl-087` | `nl` | `tools.image.previewControls` | accessibility / specificity | `"Voorbeeldbediening"` | `"Regelaars voor afbeeldingsvoorbeeld"` | The accessible group name must identify both the controls and their image-preview scope. `Regelaars` and `afbeeldingsvoorbeeld` are attested Dutch product terms; the current compact compound is generic and drops the image object. Sources: [W3C WAI-ARIA Authoring Practices вҖ” Providing Accessible Names and Descriptions](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/practices/names-and-descriptions/); [Apple Support NL вҖ” Finder on Mac Pro](https://support.apple.com/nl-nl/guide/mac-pro/apddf030866a/mac); [Apple Support NL вҖ” Belichtings- en kleurinstellingen aanpassen](https://support.apple.com/nl-nl/guide/iphone/-iphebbd067ce/ios); [Microsoft Support NL вҖ” Het formaat van het Microsoft SwiftKey-toetsenbord wijzigen](https://support.microsoft.com/nl-nl/swiftkey-keyboard/how-to-resize-microsoft-swiftkey-keyboard); [Google Photos Help NL вҖ” FotoвҖҷs en videoвҖҷs verwijderen en herstellen](https://support.google.com/photos/answer/6128850?co=GENIE.Platform%3DAndroid&hl=nl). | verified |
| `F-nl-088` | `nl` | `tools.image.errorSourceOffline` | natural error copy | `"Het bronbestand is mogelijk verplaatst of offline."` | `"Het bronbestand is mogelijk verplaatst of niet beschikbaar."` | The caller only knows the remote source cannot be loaded; it does not establish a synchronized offline-file state. `niet beschikbaar` accurately describes the unavailable resource and is natural Dutch error copy. Sources: [Microsoft Support NL вҖ” Een verbindingsfout corrigeren](https://support.microsoft.com/nl-nl/excel/how-to-correct-a-connect-error); [Microsoft Support NL вҖ” De status Off-line bestand wordt onjuist weergegeven](https://support.microsoft.com/nl-nl/topic/de-status-off-line-bestand-wordt-onjuist-weergegeven-in-file-explorer-in-windows-3026cc25-2d68-1202-2d14-d20e63246a5a). | verified |
| `F-nl-089` | `nl` | `searchTerms.header` | search alias / domain terminology | `"koptekst"` | `"tussenkop"` | `koptekst` has the page-header sense in Dutch editor terminology, while this caller routes only to content heading blocks. `tussenkop` is a legitimate in-text heading term and adds a distinct route beside `title=titel` and `heading=kop`. The first-pass objection that `tussenkop` is narrower does not rescue the current wrong-domain page-header alias. Sources: [Notion Help NL вҖ” Basisprincipes voor schrijven en bewerken](https://www.notion.com/nl/help/writing-and-editing-basics); [Microsoft Support NL вҖ” Een kop- of voettekst invoegen](https://support.microsoft.com/nl-nl/word/training/insert-a-header-or-footer); [Onze Taal вҖ” Tussenkopjes (algemeen)](https://onzetaal.nl/taalloket/tussenkopjes-algemeen). | verified |
| `F-nl-090` | `nl` | `searchTerms.number` | search alias / editor terminology | `"nummer"` | `"nummering"` | `nummering` is the established Dutch editor feature/operation term for numbered lists; `nummer` names an individual number. The replacement therefore adds the correct operation alias without removing the current query path. Sources: [LibreOffice Help NL вҖ” Nummering en nummeringsstijlen](https://help.libreoffice.org/latest/nl/text/swriter/guide/using_numbering.html); [LibreOffice Help NL вҖ” Nummering toevoegen](https://help.libreoffice.org/latest/nl/text/swriter/guide/using_numbered_lists2.html). | verified |

| `F-hy-070` | `hy` | `tools.callout.addEmoji` | source synchronization / icon terminology | `"ФұХҫХҘХ¬ХЎЦҒХ¶ХҘХ¬ Х§ХҙХёХ»Х«"` | `"ФұХҫХҘХ¬ХЎЦҒХ¶ХҘХ¬ ХәХЎХҝХҜХҘЦҖХЎХҜ"` | English deliberately broadened the outer callout action from вҖңAdd emojiвҖқ to вҖңAdd iconвҖқ; the live button opens the symbol picker, and Armenian siblings already say `ФҪХҙХўХЎХЈЦҖХҘХ¬ ХәХЎХҝХҜХҘЦҖХЎХҜХЁ` and `ХҖХҘХјХЎЦҒХ¶ХҘХ¬ ХәХЎХҝХҜХҘЦҖХЎХҜХЁ`. The final preserves the outer icon versus inner emoji distinction and follows the current Armenian government standard [`Icon` вҶ’ `ХҠХЎХҝХҜХҘЦҖХЎХҜ`](https://standards.hightech.gov.am/%D5%BF%D5%A5%D6%80%D5%B4%D5%AB%D5%B6%D5%B6%D5%A5%D6%80%D5%AB-%D6%81%D5%A1%D5%B6%D5%AF/). | verified |

| `F-hu-110` | `hu` | `tools.video.speedPresets` | terminology | `"SebessГ©g-elЕ‘beГЎllГӯtГЎsok"` | `"ElЕ‘re beГЎllГӯtott sebessГ©gek"` | The final вҖңElЕ‘re beГЎllГӯtott sebessГ©gekвҖқ preserves the media callerвҖҷs exact action or accessible name in idiomatic Hungarian; current вҖңSebessГ©g-elЕ‘beГЎllГӯtГЎsokвҖқ is narrower, less precise, or uses inconsistent product terminology. | verified |
| `F-hu-111` | `hu` | `tools.video.ctxCopyUrl` | consistency and clarity | `"VideГі URL mГЎsolГЎsa"` | `"VideГі URL-cГӯmГ©nek mГЎsolГЎsa"` | The context-menu noun phrase naturally omits an unnecessary article while using established вҖңURL-cГӯmвҖқ terminology. | verified |
| `F-hu-112` | `hu` | `tools.video.ctxCopyUrlAtTime` | consistency and clarity | `"VideГі URL mГЎsolГЎsa az aktuГЎlis idЕ‘pontnГЎl"` | `"VideГі URL-cГӯmГ©nek mГЎsolГЎsa az aktuГЎlis idЕ‘ponttГіl"` | The context-menu label preserves the source-time meaning with вҖңaz aktuГЎlis idЕ‘ponttГіlвҖқ and the same concise URL-cГӯm construction. | verified |
| `F-hu-113` | `hu` | `tools.video.ctxStats` | terminology | `"RГ©szletes statisztika"` | `"LejГЎtszГЎsi statisztikГЎk"` | The final вҖңLejГЎtszГЎsi statisztikГЎkвҖқ preserves the media callerвҖҷs exact action or accessible name in idiomatic Hungarian; current вҖңRГ©szletes statisztikaвҖқ is narrower, less precise, or uses inconsistent product terminology. | verified |
| `F-hu-114` | `hu` | `tools.callout.emojiSearchResults` | semantic scope and product style | `"{count} emodzsi talГЎlhatГі"` | `"{count} emoji talГЎlhatГі"` | The final follows current Hungarian product usage of вҖңemoji/emojikвҖқ, preserves the picker action or count, and avoids the inconsistent вҖңemodzsiвҖқ spelling. | verified |
| `F-hu-115` | `hu` | `tools.table.compactText` | terminology / density semantics | `"TГ¶mГ¶r szГ¶veg"` | `"Kompakt szГ¶veg"` | The visible table text-size choice controls compact display density; `TГ¶mГ¶r` normally characterizes concise content rather than a visual size mode. `Kompakt` is the established counterpart to the existing `KГ©nyelmes szГ¶veg`, matching the paired density labels used by [Gmail](https://support.google.com/mail/answer/5900?co=GENIE.Platform%3DDesktop&hl=hu) and [Microsoft Teams](https://support.microsoft.com/hu-HU/teams/chat/change-the-spacing-of-your-chat-messages-in-microsoft-teams). | verified |
| `F-hu-116` | `hu` | `a11y.blocksMoved` | accessibility / spoken grammar / count neutrality | `"{count} blokk ГЎthelyezve a(z) {position}. pozГӯciГіba"` | `"{count} blokk ГЎthelyezve. Гҡj pozГӯciГі: {position}."` | The assertive multi-block drop announcement receives `count >= 2` and the first moved blockвҖҷs new one-based position. Hungarian keeps `blokk` singular after a cardinal, while the two-clause final removes speech-hostile written `a(z)`, preserves placeholder order, and matches the corrected single-block family. [Google Accessibility explains that screen-reader punctuation output is configurable](https://support.google.com/accessibility/answer/90559?hl=hu). | verified |
| `F-hu-117` | `hu` | `a11y.navigationPosition` | accessibility / spoken numeric relation | `"{tool}, {position}/{total}"` | `"{tool}, {position}. pozГӯciГі, Г¶sszesen {total}"` | This throttled polite live-region message announces the localized tool, one-based position, and current total. Lexical labels avoid relying on slash pronunciation, preserve all placeholders in caller order, and align with the existing Hungarian `movedUp`, `movedDown`, and seek-value wording. [MicrosoftвҖҷs Hungarian screen-reader guidance describes hearing a taskвҖҷs new position](https://support.microsoft.com/hu-HU/accessibility/todo/use-a-screen-reader-to-move-tasks-between-or-within-lists-in-to-do). | verified |

| `F-id-005` | `id` | `toolbox.addBelow` | grammar | `"Klik untuk tambah di bawah"` | `"Klik untuk menambahkan di bawah"` | Sesudah вҖңuntukвҖқ, verba berimbuhan вҖңmenambahkanвҖқ lebih alami untuk instruksi antarmuka daripada bentuk pangkas вҖңtambahвҖқ. Baris ini menjadi baris pertama tooltip tombol plus dan menjelaskan hasil klik biasa: menambahkan blok di bawah. [Sumber primer](https://support.microsoft.com/id-id/office/menambahkan-mengedit-atau-menghapus-tempat-penampung-pada-tata-letak-slide-a8d93d28-66cb-43fd-9f9d-e12d0a7a1f06). | verified |
| `F-id-006` | `id` | `toolbox.optionAddAbove` | grammar | `"вҢҘ-klik untuk tambah di atas"` | `"вҢҘ-klik untuk menambahkan di atas"` | Nama tombol dan arah tetap dipertahankan; verba вҖңmenambahkanвҖқ melengkapi konstruksi вҖңuntukвҖқ secara alami. Tooltip memilih instruksi Option-click pada platform non-Windows untuk menambahkan blok di atas. [Sumber primer](https://support.microsoft.com/id-id/office/menambahkan-mengedit-atau-menghapus-tempat-penampung-pada-tata-letak-slide-a8d93d28-66cb-43fd-9f9d-e12d0a7a1f06). | verified |
| `F-id-007` | `id` | `toolbox.ctrlAddAbove` | grammar | `"Ctrl-klik untuk tambah di atas"` | `"Ctrl-klik untuk menambahkan di atas"` | Nama tombol dan arah tetap dipertahankan; verba вҖңmenambahkanвҖқ melengkapi konstruksi вҖңuntukвҖқ secara alami. Tooltip memilih instruksi Ctrl-click pada Windows untuk menambahkan blok di atas. [Sumber primer](https://support.microsoft.com/id-id/office/menambahkan-mengedit-atau-menghapus-tempat-penampung-pada-tata-letak-slide-a8d93d28-66cb-43fd-9f9d-e12d0a7a1f06). | verified |
| `F-id-008` | `id` | `tools.table.clearSelection` | caller-semantic | `"Hapus"` | `"Kosongkan isi"` | Pada pilihan sel tabel, вҖңHapusвҖқ ambigu dengan penghapusan baris/kolom; вҖңKosongkan isiвҖқ menyatakan bahwa hanya isi sel yang dibersihkan. Perintah dijalankan pada seleksi sel tabel; label harus membedakan pengosongan isi dari penghapusan baris atau kolom. [Sumber primer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/style-guide/global-communications/writing-tips). | verified |
| `F-id-009` | `id` | `tools.table.placement` | terminology | `"Penempatan"` | `"Perataan"` | Kontrol ini mengatur alignment isi sel, bukan penempatan objek; вҖңPerataanвҖқ juga konsisten dengan kontrol alignment media. Teks ditampilkan dalam pemilih perataan sel tabel; istilah dan posisi harus konsisten sebagai satu sistem opsi. [Sumber primer](https://support.microsoft.com/id-id/office/security-privacy/set-or-change-table-properties). | verified |

| `F-id-018` | `id` | `a11y.dragHandle` | accessibility-clarity | `"Seret untuk memindahkan blok atau klik untuk menu"` | `"Seret untuk memindahkan blok atau klik untuk membuka menu"` | Menambahkan verba вҖңmembukaвҖқ membuat akibat klik eksplisit bagi pengguna pembaca layar; вҖңklik untuk menuвҖқ terdengar terpotong. Teks ini adalah nama aksesibel pegangan blok yang memiliki dua tindakan berbeda: seret untuk memindahkan dan klik untuk membuka menu. [Sumber primer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/style-guide/global-communications/writing-tips). | verified |
| `F-id-019` | `id` | `a11y.blockDuplicated` | accessibility-register | `"Blok diduplikasi di posisi {position} dari {total}"` | `"Blok digandakan di posisi {position} dari {total}"` | вҖңDigandakanвҖқ menyampaikan hasil tindakan duplicate dengan bahasa Indonesia yang lebih alami daripada serapan вҖңdiduplikasiвҖқ, tanpa mengubah placeholder. Pesan diumumkan secara assertive setelah satu blok selesai digandakan dan menyertakan posisi serta total blok. [Sumber primer](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/2839737?hl=id). | verified |
| `F-id-020` | `id` | `a11y.blocksDuplicated` | accessibility-register | `"{count} blok diduplikasi mulai dari posisi {position}"` | `"{count} blok digandakan mulai dari posisi {position}"` | вҖңDigandakanвҖқ adalah bentuk pasif Indonesia yang alami untuk duplicate; urutan dan himpunan placeholder tetap sama. Pesan diumumkan secara assertive setelah beberapa blok digandakan dan menyebut jumlah serta posisi awal. [Sumber primer](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/2839737?hl=id). | verified |
| `F-id-021` | `id` | `a11y.searchResults` | accessibility | `"{count} hasil"` | `"Hasil pencarian: {count}"` | Pengumuman pembaca layar perlu menyebut konteks pencarian; вҖң{count} hasilвҖқ saja ambigu. Status hasil pencarian toolbox diumumkan kepada teknologi bantu dan harus menyebut hasil serta jumlahnya. [Sumber primer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/style-guide/global-communications/writing-tips). | verified |
| `F-id-022` | `id` | `a11y.allBlocksSelected` | accessibility | `"Semua blok dipilih, {count} blok"` | `"Semua blok dipilih. Total: {count}"` | Dua kalimat singkat mempertahankan status dan label total dengan jeda yang jelas bagi pembaca layar. Pengumuman pemilihan semua blok harus menyampaikan keadaan dan jumlah total secara eksplisit. [Sumber primer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/style-guide/global-communications/writing-tips). | verified |
| `F-id-023` | `id` | `a11y.navigationModeEntered` | spelling | `"Mode navigasi. Gunakan tombol panah untuk berpindah antar blok, Enter untuk mengedit, Escape untuk keluar."` | `"Mode navigasi. Gunakan tombol panah untuk berpindah antarblok, Enter untuk mengedit, dan Escape untuk keluar."` | Bentuk terikat вҖңantar-вҖқ dirangkai dengan nomina menjadi вҖңantarblokвҖқ; instruksi tombol dan urutannya tidak berubah. Pengumuman assertive menjelaskan perubahan mode keyboard dan seluruh cara bergerak, mengedit, serta keluar. [Sumber primer](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/4492226?hl=id). | verified |
| `F-id-024` | `id` | `searchTerms.heading` | semantic | `"kepala"` | `"judul bagian"` | Heading dokumen adalah вҖңjudul bagianвҖқ, bukan вҖңkepalaвҖқ; istilah kini tetap berguna sebagai kata pencarian. Istilah dipakai sebagai alias pencarian agar pengguna yang mencari konsep heading menemukan alat yang tepat. [Sumber primer](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/1632201?hl=id-ID). | verified |
| `F-id-025` | `id` | `tools.callout.addEmoji` | source-fidelity | `"Tambah emoji"` | `"Tambah ikon"` | Salinan Inggris dan tindakan yang terlihat menyebut ikon; вҖңemojiвҖқ terlalu menyempitkan arti label. Teks dipakai oleh kontrol ikon, pencarian emoji, kategori, atau warna callout; label harus menamai tindakan atau objek yang sebenarnya. [Sumber primer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/style-guide/global-communications/writing-tips). | verified |
| `F-id-026` | `id` | `tools.callout.filterEmojis` | accessibility | `"CariвҖҰ"` | `"Cari emojiвҖҰ"` | Placeholder sekaligus label pencarian perlu menyebut objek pencarian, bukan hanya вҖңCariвҖқ. Teks dipakai oleh kontrol ikon, pencarian emoji, kategori, atau warna callout; label harus menamai tindakan atau objek yang sebenarnya. [Sumber primer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/style-guide/global-communications/writing-tips). | verified |
| `F-id-027` | `id` | `tools.callout.noEmojisFound` | naturalness | `"Tidak ada emoji ditemukan"` | `"Emoji tidak ditemukan"` | Susunan ini lebih langsung dan alami daripada konstruksi pasif eksistensial вҖңTidak ada emoji ditemukanвҖқ. Teks dipakai oleh kontrol ikon, pencarian emoji, kategori, atau warna callout; label harus menamai tindakan atau objek yang sebenarnya. [Sumber primer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/style-guide/global-communications/writing-tips). | verified |
| `F-id-028` | `id` | `tools.callout.pickRandom` | accessibility | `"Acak"` | `"Pilih emoji acak"` | Label tombol ikon harus menjelaskan hasil tindakan; вҖңAcakвҖқ saja tidak menyebut apa yang dipilih. Teks dipakai oleh kontrol ikon, pencarian emoji, kategori, atau warna callout; label harus menamai tindakan atau objek yang sebenarnya. [Sumber primer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/style-guide/global-communications/writing-tips). | verified |
| `F-id-029` | `id` | `tools.callout.emojiCategoryPeople` | terminology | `"Smiley dan orang"` | `"Wajah tersenyum dan orang"` | вҖңWajah tersenyumвҖқ adalah padanan Indonesia yang jelas; вҖңSmileyвҖқ tidak perlu dipertahankan dalam label kategori. Teks dipakai oleh kontrol ikon, pencarian emoji, kategori, atau warna callout; label harus menamai tindakan atau objek yang sebenarnya. [Sumber primer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/style-guide/global-communications/writing-tips). | verified |
| `F-id-030` | `id` | `tools.callout.colorBrown` | spelling | `"Coklat"` | `"Cokelat"` | вҖңCokelatвҖқ ialah bentuk baku dan sudah dipakai oleh swatch cokelat lain dalam katalog yang sama. Tidak ada lookup produksi langsung untuk kunci lama ini: kunci tetap dapat diselesaikan melalui namespace `tools.callout` karena callout terdaftar, sedangkan pemilih bersama yang aktif merender `tools.colorPicker.color.brown`. [Sumber primer](https://repositori.kemendikdasmen.go.id/31401/1/EDISI_21_2018.pdf). | verified |
| `F-id-031` | `id` | `tools.code.searchLanguage` | punctuation | `"Cari bahasa..."` | `"Cari bahasaвҖҰ"` | Karakter elipsis tunggal mengikuti salinan sumber dan pola placeholder katalog, bukan tiga titik ASCII. Placeholder bidang pencarian bahasa kode harus mempertahankan jeda elipsis dan instruksi singkat. [Sumber primer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/style-guide/global-communications/writing-tips). | verified |
| `F-id-032` | `id` | `blockSettings.copyLinkSuccess` | terminology | `"Tautan disalin ke clipboard"` | `"Tautan disalin ke papan klip"` | вҖңPapan klipвҖқ ialah padanan Indonesia dan sudah dipakai pada notifikasi salin tautan lain. Toast konfirmasi muncul setelah URL blok berhasil disalin ke clipboard. [Sumber primer](https://support.microsoft.com/id-ID/Word/copy-and-paste-using-the-office-clipboard). | verified |
| `F-id-033` | `id` | `tools.link.linkTitle` | semantic | `"Judul tautan"` | `"Teks tautan"` | Field ini menyunting teks tampilan tautan, bukan judul tautan. Label menamai teks tampilan sebuah tautan, bukan judul dokumen tujuan. [Sumber primer](https://support.microsoft.com/id-id/office/menambahkan-konten-dan-tautan-yang-mudah-diakses-ke-situs-sharepoint-online-dc34fac7-32d7-4dcf-b694-2cc6115ac8b9). | verified |
| `F-id-034` | `id` | `tools.image.altDescription` | accessibility-fidelity | `"Tambahkan teks alternatif untuk menjelaskan gambar ini. Ini membuat halaman lebih mudah diakses oleh pengguna dengan gangguan penglihatan atau tunanetra."` | `"Jelaskan gambar ini bagi orang yang tidak dapat melihatnya."` | Padanan ringkas mempertahankan tujuan aksesibilitas tanpa menambah dua kategori pengguna yang tidak ada pada sumber. Deskripsi pada popover alt text menjelaskan tujuan aksesibilitas kepada penulis konten. [Sumber primer](https://support.microsoft.com/id-ID/accessibility/office-accessibility/add-alternative-text-to-a-shape-picture-chart-smartart-graphic-or-other-object). | verified |
| `F-id-035` | `id` | `tools.image.errorUploadFailedTitle` | consistency | `"Unggah gagal"` | `"Unggahan gagal"` | Sebagai judul status kesalahan, frasa nomina ini alami dan konsisten dengan pesan upload gagal lain. Teks adalah judul atau detail keadaan galat pemuatan gambar dan harus mencerminkan kegagalan sebenarnya. [Sumber primer](https://support.microsoft.com/id-id/office/saya-mendapatkan-kesalahan-unggahan-gagal-atau-tidak-dapat-menyimpan-secara-otomatis-saat-mengedit-file-office-93a14d34-88e3-4a91-9eef-58cc541d31f8). | verified |
| `F-id-036` | `id` | `tools.image.errorDefaultMessage` | source-fidelity | `"URL mengembalikan kesalahan. Coba sumber lain atau unggah ulang berkas."` | `"Gambar tidak dapat dimuat dari URL ini. Coba sumber lain atau unggah kembali berkasnya."` | Teks kini menyatakan kegagalan memuat dari URL dan kedua opsi pemulihan tanpa mengarang bahwa URL вҖңmengembalikan kesalahanвҖқ. Teks adalah judul atau detail keadaan galat pemuatan gambar dan harus mencerminkan kegagalan sebenarnya. [Sumber primer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/style-guide/global-communications/writing-tips). | verified |

| `F-mr-003` | `mr` | `blockSettings.clickAction` | caller composition | `"аӨ•аҘҚаӨІаӨҝаӨ• аӨ•аӨ°аӨҫ"` | `"аӨ®аҘҮаӨЁаҘӮ аӨүаӨҳаӨЎаӨЈаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨёаӨҫаӨ аҘҖ аӨ•аҘҚаӨІаӨҝаӨ• аӨ•аӨ°аӨҫ"` | The highlighted click branch must be a complete alternative in the segmented tooltip. Together with the other two final fragments it reads вҖңаӨ®аҘҮаӨЁаҘӮ аӨүаӨҳаӨЎаӨЈаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨёаӨҫаӨ аҘҖ аӨ•аҘҚаӨІаӨҝаӨ• аӨ•аӨ°аӨҫ аӨ•аӨҝаӨӮаӨөаӨҫ вҢҳ/ аӨҰаӨҫаӨ¬аӨҫвҖқ. | verified |
| `F-mr-004` | `mr` | `blockSettings.orConjunction` | caller composition | `" аӨ•аӨҝаӨӮаӨөаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҖаӨ¬аҘӢаӨ°аҘҚаӨЎ аӨ¶аҘүаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹаӨ•аӨҹ "` | `" аӨ•аӨҝаӨӮаӨөаӨҫ "` | The concrete shortcut is the next highlighted segment, so repeating вҖңаӨ•аҘҖаӨ¬аҘӢаӨ°аҘҚаӨЎ аӨ¶аҘүаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹаӨ•аӨҹвҖқ is redundant. The intentional edge spaces are retained for direct concatenation. | verified |
| `F-mr-005` | `mr` | `blockSettings.openMenuAction` | caller composition | `" аӨ®аҘҮаӨЁаҘӮ аӨүаӨҳаӨЎаӨЈаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨёаӨҫаӨ аҘҖ"` | `" аӨҰаӨҫаӨ¬аӨҫ"` | This suffix follows the runtime shortcut and supplies its required imperative. The menu-opening purpose has already moved to the click branch. | verified |
| `F-mr-006` | `mr` | `toolNames.toggleList` | tool-type semantics | `"аӨёаӨӮаӨ•аҘҒаӨҡаӨҝаӨӨ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаҘҖ"` | `"аӨҹаҘүаӨ—аӨІ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаҘҖ"` | This is the persistent toolbox type, not the blockвҖҷs current collapsed state. GoogleвҖҷs Marathi UI already uses аӨҹаҘүаӨ—аӨІ for an expand/collapse control, making the short product label preferable to вҖңаӨёаӨӮаӨ•аҘҒаӨҡаӨҝаӨӨ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаҘҖвҖқ. | verified |
| `F-mr-007` | `mr` | `tools.marker.textColor` | semantic completeness | `"аӨ®аӨңаӨ•аҘӮаӨ°"` | `"аӨ®аӨңаӨ•аҘҒаӨ°аӨҫаӨҡаӨҫ аӨ°аӨӮаӨ—"` | The shared picker needs the complete text-color axis, and GoogleвҖҷs Marathi editor uses this exact term. | verified |
| `F-mr-008` | `mr` | `tools.colorPicker.defaultSwatchLabel` | placeholder composition | `"{mode} {default}"` | `"{mode}: {default}"` | The caller substitutes an axis and state into an accessible swatch name. A colon gives the spoken label/value boundary while preserving both placeholders. | verified |
| `F-mr-009` | `mr` | `tools.colorPicker.colorSwatchLabel` | placeholder composition | `"{mode} {color}"` | `"{mode}: {color}"` | The caller substitutes an axis and color into an accessible swatch name. A colon gives the spoken label/value boundary while preserving both placeholders. | verified |

| `F-mr-018` | `mr` | `tools.toggle.ariaLabelExpand` | official accessibility terminology | `"аӨөаӨҝаӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨҫаӨ°аӨҝаӨӨ аӨ•аӨ°аӨҫ"` | `"аӨөаӨҝаӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘғаӨӨ аӨ•аӨ°аӨҫ"` | Use AOSP MarathiвҖҷs exact accessibility action, paired with the existing аӨёаӨӮаӨ•аҘҒаӨҡаӨҝаӨӨ аӨ•аӨ°аӨҫ. | verified |
| `F-mr-019` | `mr` | `tools.table.clearSelection` | semantic completeness | `"аӨёаӨҫаӨ« аӨ•аӨ°аӨҫ"` | `"аӨҶаӨ¶аӨҜ аӨёаӨҫаӨ« аӨ•аӨ°аӨҫ"` | Both callers clear selected cell contents, not the selection or formatting. аӨҶаӨ¶аӨҜ is the established broad content noun in the cited Google Marathi product copy and is more precise than bare вҖңаӨёаӨҫаӨ« аӨ•аӨ°аӨҫвҖқ. | verified |
| `F-mr-020` | `mr` | `tools.table.headerColumn` | table terminology | `"аӨ¶аҘҖаӨ°аҘҚаӨ· аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨӮаӨӯ"` | `"аӨ№аҘҮаӨЎаӨ° аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨӮаӨӯ"` | The option toggles header semantics on the first column; аӨ¶аҘҖаӨ°аҘҚаӨ· means only вҖңtopвҖқ. GoogleвҖҷs current Marathi editor uses аӨ№аҘҮаӨЎаӨ° for this structural table role. The competing аӨ¶аҘҖаӨ°аҘҚаӨ·аӨІаҘҮаӨ– evidence describes a column header, a different relation. | verified |
| `F-mr-021` | `mr` | `tools.table.headerRow` | table terminology | `"аӨ¶аҘҖаӨ°аҘҚаӨ· аӨӘаӨӮаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаҘҖ"` | `"аӨ№аҘҮаӨЎаӨ° аӨӘаӨӮаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаҘҖ"` | The option toggles a semantic header row, and GoogleвҖҷs Marathi screen-reader instructions use the exact phrase аӨ№аҘҮаӨЎаӨ° аӨӘаӨӮаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаҘҖ. | verified |

The literal вҖңаӨҶаӨ°аӨҫаӨ®аӨҰаӨҫаӨҜаӨ• аӨ®аӨңаӨ•аҘӮаӨ°вҖқ describes reading comfort rather than the density/size mode. | verified |

| `F-ms-010` | `ms` | `tools.marker.textColor` | semantic completeness | `"Teks"` | `"Warna teks"` | The current value means only вҖңTextвҖқ and collapses the text-color axis into other text labels. | verified |

| `F-ms-013` | `ms` | `tools.table.mergeCells` | morphology / table action | `"Gabung sel"` | `"Gabungkan sel"` | The transitive imperative requires the -kan form; вҖңGabung selвҖқ is clipped and nonstandard in this UI register. | verified |
| `F-ms-014` | `ms` | `tools.table.splitCell` | morphology / table action | `"Pisah sel"` | `"Pisahkan sel"` | The transitive imperative requires the -kan form; вҖңPisah selвҖқ is clipped and nonstandard in this UI register. | verified |

| `F-ms-016` | `ms` | `tools.table.dragToAddRemoveRows` | grammar / table instruction | `"Seret untuk tambah atau buang baris"` | `"Seret untuk menambah atau mengalih keluar baris"` | The active verbs give a grammatical instruction and вҖңalih keluarвҖқ matches established Malaysian UI terminology. | verified |
| `F-ms-017` | `ms` | `tools.table.clickToAddColumn` | grammar / table instruction | `"Klik untuk tambah lajur baharu"` | `"Klik untuk menambah lajur baharu"` | The active verb after вҖңuntukвҖқ is required in a full instruction. | verified |

| `F-ms-029` | `ms` | `blockSettings.lastEditedBy` | natural UI wording / placeholder grammar | `"Terakhir disunting oleh {name}"` | `"Kali terakhir disunting oleh {name}"` | The metadata label needs the same natural word order while preserving the editor-name placeholder. | verified |
| `F-ms-030` | `ms` | `a11y.dragHandle` | accessibility / action scope | `"Seret untuk alih blok atau klik untuk menu"` | `"Seret untuk mengalihkan blok atau klik untuk membuka menu"` | The ARIA name must state both complete actions; the current вҖңklik untuk menuвҖқ omits the result of clicking. | verified |

| `F-ms-035` | `ms` | `a11y.blocksDuplicated` | accessibility semantics | `"{count} blok disalin bermula dari kedudukan {position}"` | `"{count} blok digandakan bermula pada kedudukan {position}"` | The event creates duplicate blocks; the proposed wording preserves the count and first-copy destination. | verified |

The proposal mirrors the state-plus-total contract and remains number-neutral. | verified |

| `F-ms-041` | `ms` | `a11y.navigatedToBlock` | accessibility state semantics | `"Dinavigasi ke blok"` | `"Telah beralih ke blok"` | вҖңTelah beralih ke blokвҖқ naturally announces completed focus movement without exposing an unnatural transliteration of вҖңnavigatedвҖқ. | verified |
| `F-ms-042` | `ms` | `toolNames.underline` | capitalization | `"Garis Bawah"` | `"Garis bawah"` | Malay UI labels use sentence case; the common noun вҖңbawahвҖқ should not be capitalized. | verified |
| `F-ms-043` | `ms` | `toolNames.strikethrough` | product terminology | `"Garis tengah"` | `"Garis batal"` | Official Google Malay editor terminology uses вҖңgaris batalвҖқ; вҖңgaris tengahвҖқ means a center line. | verified |
| `F-ms-044` | `ms` | `toolNames.divider` | product terminology | `"Pembahagi"` | `"Pemisah"` | This tool inserts a visual separator; вҖңpembahagiвҖқ suggests a divider/person or arithmetic divisor rather than the UI element. | verified |

| `F-my-021` | `my` | `a11y.dragHandle` | accessibility / action clarity | `"бҖҳбҖңбҖұбҖ¬бҖҖбҖәбҖӣбҖҪбҖҫбҖұбҖ·бҖӣбҖ”бҖә бҖҶбҖҪбҖІбҖҡбҖ°бҖ•бҖ« бҖһбҖӯбҖҜбҖ·бҖҷбҖҹбҖҜбҖҗбҖә бҖҷбҖ®бҖ”бҖ°бҖёбҖЎбҖҗбҖҪбҖҖбҖә бҖ”бҖҫбҖӯбҖ•бҖәбҖ•бҖ«"` | `"бҖҳбҖңбҖұбҖ¬бҖҖбҖәбҖӣбҖҪбҖҫбҖұбҖ·бҖӣбҖ”бҖә бҖҶбҖҪбҖІбҖҡбҖ°бҖ•бҖ« бҖһбҖӯбҖҜбҖ·бҖҷбҖҹбҖҜбҖҗбҖә бҖҷбҖ®бҖ”бҖ°бҖёбҖ–бҖҪбҖ„бҖ·бҖәбҖӣбҖ”бҖә бҖ”бҖҫбҖӯбҖ•бҖәбҖ•бҖ«"` | A complete instruction should say the click opens the menu; бҖҷбҖ®бҖ”бҖ°бҖёбҖЎбҖҗбҖҪбҖҖбҖә is vague. | verified |

| `F-my-082` | `my` | `tools.audio.coverUrlPlaceholder` | established ui terminology | `"бҖ•бҖҜбҖ¶ URL бҖ•бҖ«бҖ…бҖҗбҖәбҖ•бҖ«вҖҰ"` | `"бҖ•бҖҜбҖ¶ URL бҖҖбҖӯбҖҜ бҖҖбҖ°бҖёбҖ‘бҖҠбҖ·бҖәбҖ•бҖ«вҖҰ"` | Replace avoidable вҖңбҖ•бҖ«бҖ…бҖҗбҖәвҖқ transliteration with AOSPвҖҷs established Burmese Paste action вҖңбҖҖбҖ°бҖёбҖ‘бҖҠбҖ·бҖәвҖқ. | verified |
| `F-my-083` | `my` | `tools.audio.coverSourceAria` | accessibility object scope | `"бҖ•бҖҜбҖ¶бҖҷбҖ°бҖӣбҖ„бҖәбҖё"` | `"бҖЎбҖ–бҖҜбҖ¶бҖёбҖ•бҖҜбҖ¶бҖӣбҖ„бҖәбҖёбҖҷбҖјбҖ…бҖә"` | Name both the audio-cover object and its source selector role. | verified |

## Exact-English Retentions

Record every non-English value that is exactly identical to English. The only
allowed categories are `universal notation`, `product-brand`, `acronym`,
`established cognate`, and `established loanword`. Similar spelling alone is
not a justification; the source must support normal unchanged use in the
locale and UI context.

| Retention ID | Locale | Key | Category | Justification | Source |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `R-<locale>-NNN` | `<locale>` | `<key>` | category | justification | source |
| `R-cs-012` | `cs` | `notifier.ok` | established loanword | `OK` is the conventional unchanged Czech confirmation-button label. | [LibreOffice Czech Help вҖ” dialog buttons](https://help.libreoffice.org/latest/cs/text/shared/optionen/01000000.html) |
| `R-bg-001` | `bg` | `blockSettings.menuShortcutMac` | universal notation | `вҢҳ/` is macOS shortcut notation rather than English prose; Bulgarian Apple guidance retains symbolic modifier notation. | [Apple вҖ” РҡР»Р°РІРёСҲРҪРё РәРҫРјРұРёРҪР°СҶРёРё](https://support.apple.com/bg-bg/126616) |
| `R-bg-002` | `bg` | `blockSettings.menuShortcutWin` | universal notation | `Ctrl+/` is Windows shortcut notation rather than translatable prose; Bulgarian Microsoft guidance retains `Ctrl` in key combinations. | [Microsoft вҖ” РҡР»Р°РІРёСҲРҪРё РәРҫРјРұРёРҪР°СҶРёРё РІ Windows](https://support.microsoft.com/bg-bg/windows/%D0%BA%D0%BB%D0%B0%D0%B2%D0%B8%D1%88%D0%BD%D0%B8-%D0%BA%D0%BE%D0%BC%D0%B1%D0%B8%D0%BD%D0%B0%D1%86%D0%B8%D0%B8-%D0%B2-windows-dcc61a57-8ff0-cffe-9796-cb9706c75eec) |
